Job Description:

Skills and Experience:
Job description
About Us
Reforged Labs is a YC-backed, Sandhill Road funded AI startup revolutionizing how the world's top mobile gaming studios market themselves to hundreds of millions of players. We're building cutting-edge AI technology that powers sophisticated ad analysis and generation pipelines for elite global gaming companies. 
We don't follow trend; we set them. Our engineering team builds solutions that rival the best Silicon Valley has to offer, creating technology that generates millions of dollars in value for our customers.
 The Role 
We're seeking an exceptional Senior Product Designer to join our fast-growing team in Ho Chi Minh City. This is not a role for the average designer; we're looking exclusively for extraordinary talent who can compete with the best designers globally. 
You'll spearhead the user experience design of our AI-driven platforms, crafting intuitive interfaces that make powerful technology accessible and delightful to use. Your designs will directly impact how hundreds of millions of players discover and experience games through our AI-powered marketing tools. 
Core Responsibilities 
● Design elegant, intuitive interfaces for our AI copilot tools that seamlessly blend sophistication with usability 
● Create comprehensive user journeys and information architecture for complex AI-powered workflows 
● Develop and maintain a cohesive design system that ensures consistency across our product suite 
● Translate product requirements into thoughtful user experiences that make AI capabilities accessible 
● Collaborate closely with product and engineering teams to bridge user needs with technical possibilities 
● Gather and incorporate user feedback through thoughtful iteration cycles 
● Drive design decisions that shape our platform's user experience and future direction 
● Set the standard for design excellence and best practices across the organization

Your skills and experience
Required Experience 
● 5+ years of product design experience with a focus on complex digital products 
● Strong portfolio demonstrating exceptional design work that has reached millions of users 
● Experience designing interfaces for AI-powered products or features 
● Expert knowledge of design tools (Figma, Sketch, etc.) and prototyping techniques 
● Track record of designing B2B SaaS applications and consumer-facing products 
● Deep understanding of how humans interact with AI systems and how to design for these interactions 
● Experience with user research, testing methodologies, and data-informed design decisions ● Professional English communication skills (verbal and written) 
Essential Qualities 
● Creative problem-solver who can make complex technologies accessible through intuitive design 
● Strategic thinker who considers both short-term usability and long-term product vision 
● Self-starter mentality with strong ownership of the design process from concept to implementation 
● Excellence in time management and ability to meet ambitious deadlines 
● Clear communication skills, especially around design decisions and trade-offs
 ● Collaborative mindset with the ability to incorporate feedback while maintaining design integrity 
● Passion for creating exceptional user experiences that drive product adoption and engagement 
● Comfort working in a fast-paced startup environment 
Interview Process 
1. Initial Portfolio Review & Discussion (60 mins) 
○ Portfolio presentation and walkthrough 
○ Design thinking and problem-solving discussion 
○ High-level experience overview 
2. Design Challenge (1 week to complete) 
○ Real-world problem related to our domain 
○ Opportunity to demonstrate your skills comprehensively 
3. Design Review & Collaboration Exercise (90 mins) ○ Deep dive into your design challenge solution 
○ Collaborative design exercise with our team 
○ Discussion on design systems and scalability 
4. Final Leadership Conversation (60 mins) 
○ Vision alignment with founders 
○ Culture and team fit discussion
 ○ Two-way Q&A about growth opportunities 
We aim to complete the entire process within 2-3 weeks. 
Note: This role is designed for elite design talent. If you're not consistently recognized as among the most capable designers in your current organization, this position is likely not a good fit. We're looking for candidates who can demonstrate outstanding design abilities and deliver outsized impact. 
If you believe you're among the most skilled product designers and are excited about shaping cutting-edge AI interfaces, we want to talk to you.

● Demonstrated ability to balance technical excellence with business priorities 
● Experience managing senior engineers and fostering their growth 
● Understanding of AI/ML integration and workflow systems 
● Experience with agile development methodologies and sprint management 
● Professional English communication skills (Vietnamese language skills welcome) 
Essential Qualities 
● Leadership presence that inspires confidence and commitment from technical teams 
● Strategic thinking balanced with operational excellence and attention to detail 
● Strong communicator who can translate between technical and business stakeholders 
● Data-driven approach to measuring team performance and productivity 
● Ability to make difficult decisions and trade-offs to maintain delivery momentum 
● Problem-solver who thrives in a fast-paced startup environment 
● Passion for building and developing high-performing engineering teams 
● Comfort with ambiguity and rapid change in a growing company 
Interview Process 
Our thorough 3-week interview process is designed to evaluate both your leadership abilities and technical acumen: 
1. Technical Founder Assessment 
○ Leadership philosophy and approach 
○ Technical background discussion 
○ Real-world engineering challenges 
2. Leadership & Delivery Excellence 
○ Panel with senior engineers on technical leadership 
○ Solution presentation to a real engineering challenge 
○ Team scaling and management scenarios 
3. Executive Assessment 
○ Vision alignment with CEO 
○ Technical strategy discussion with CTO 
○ Culture fit and mutual expectations
We focus on evaluating your leadership capabilities, technical credibility, delivery excellence, cultural fit, and growth potential throughout this process. Our goal is to create a two-way dialogue that helps both of us determine if this critical role is the right fit. 
We aim to complete the entire process within 3 weeks and provide timely updates at each stage. 
Note: This role is designed for elite engineering managers. If you're not consistently recognized as a leader who can build and drive high-performing technical teams, this position is likely not a good fit. We're looking for candidates who can demonstrate outstanding leadership abilities and deliver outsized impact.

Kinh nghiệm về system security (linux, windows), cloud security (AWS, Azure, GCP) và bảo mật container (Docker, Kubernetes).

We are seeking passionate and results-driven Medior/ Senior Engineer to join our Integration Design and Governance team. This role is perfect for individuals who thrive on building scalable, maintainable, and innovative solutions in a fast-paced environment. You will have the opportunity to understand the intricacies of our business domains and design microservices and APIs that align with business capabilities while ensuring flexibility and scalability.

You will play a key role in designing resource-oriented APIs and promoting interoperability across microservices by leveraging modern integration patterns like REST APIs, event-driven architecture, and queueing patterns. Additionally, you will contribute to advanced initiatives such as microservice consolidation, GraphQL platforms (Supergraph and Subgraph), and guide teams on building cohesive microservice ecosystems that support specific business capabilities.

Title: IT Infrastructure Team Leader (AWS, M365, SaaS)
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Very attractive salary package & performance bonus
20 days annual leaves
Full legal package and 100% salary on probation
Skills and Experience:
Job description
Job Purpose:
The Infra Team Leader leads the strategic planning, development, and management of the organization’s IT infrastructure. This role ensures infrastructure scalability, efficiency, and alignment with strategic goals. Responsibilities include guiding the technology operations team, overseeing infrastructure projects, managing daily IT operations, and ensuring security and compliance. The Infra Team Leader also handles vendor relationships, budget management, and drives continuous improvement and innovation within the IT infrastructure.
 Responsibilities:
Strategic Infrastructure Planning
Create and execute strategies to improve IT infrastructure.
Ensure infrastructure projects align with the company's strategic objectives.
Manage infrastructure architecture for scalability and efficiency.
 Team Leadership and Development
Provide leadership and guidance to the technology operations team, fostering a culture of excellence, collaboration, innovation, accountability, and continuous improvement.
Recruit, mentor, and develop technical talent, building a high-performing team capable of meeting the organization's technology needs.
Set clear goals and expectations for team members and provide regular performance evaluations. Ensuring that the team consistently meets performance objectives.
 Project and Task Management
Manage infrastructure projects from start to finish.
Ensure timely, within-scope, and budget-compliant project delivery.
Collaborate with cross-functional department and Business to meet project goals.
 IT Operations Management
Oversee day-to-day IT operations to ensure stability and efficiency.
Oversee the design, development, and maintenance of scalable and secure platforms.
Ensure high availability and optimal performance of all platform services.
Manage incident and problem resolution processes to maintain high uptime and availability of all systems to maintain business continuity.
Ensure compliance with IT policies and procedures.
Champion DevOps principles to increase the ability to deliver applications and services at high velocity, enhance reliability, and streamline workflows.
Manage the server room, ensuring the health and maintenance of network devices and servers.
Oversee all hardware, software, licenses, subscriptions, and related assets.
 Security and Compliance
Ensure the security of IT infrastructure and compliance with relevant regulations.
Conduct regular audits and risk assessments to identify and mitigate security risks.
 Vendor and Stakeholder Management
Manage relationships with technology vendors and service providers.
Negotiate contracts and ensure third-party solutions meet organizational needs.
Collaborate with senior management and other stakeholders to align IT initiatives with business goals.
Manage relationships with technology vendors and service providers.
Collaborate with the Purchasing team to negotiate contracts, costs, service levels; and ensure third-party solutions meet organizational needs.
 Budget Management
Prepare and manage the budget for IT infrastructure expenditures.
Optimize resource use and ensure cost-effective solutions.
Capable of estimating infrastructure costs to support accurate project budgeting.
 Innovation and Continuous Improvement:
Keep up-to-date with new technologies and industry trends.
Lead initiatives to continuously improve IT infrastructure performance.
Promote and implement innovative solutions to business challenges.

Your skills and experience
Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
Minimum of 3 to 5 years’ experience in IT infrastructure management, with a proven track record in leading teams and managing large-scale projects.
Strong knowledge of networks, servers, storage, virtualization, and cybersecurity technologies and best practices.
Strong knowledge of DevOps principles, CI/CD methodologies, and automation tools (e.g., Gitlab, Ansible, Terraform, Kubernetes).
Extensive experience with cloud technologies and services (AWS, M365, SaaS).
Practical experience with ITIL management principles or Information Security Management System (ISMS) and ISO27001 standards.
Experience with hybrid cloud environments and multi-cloud strategies.
Proficiency in disaster recovery planning and business continuity management.
Leadership experience, especially in mentoring and guiding less-experienced team members. Demonstrated ability to lead and manage projects involving cross-functional teams.
Excellent problem-solving skills and analytical skills, with the ability to identify and resolve complex issues.
Experience in budget management and financial analysis.
Strong communication and leadership skills, capable of motivating teams and driving change.
Fluent in English, both oral and written form.

Hybrid Technologies – New view with you! 
Hybrid Technologies là công ty công nghệ phần mềm liên doanh Nhật – Việt, cung cấp các giải pháp toàn diện và mô hình làm việc đa dạng như: Phát triển CRM & Dịch vụ đám mây (Cloud), Phát triển web hay ứng dụng di động, Phát triển AI/Blockchain hay Tư vấn Chuyển đổi số (DX) … 
Đến nay, trải qua hơn 09 năm phát triển không ngừng nghỉ và gặt hái được những thành tựu nhất định, Hybrid Technologies hiện có 04 trụ sở văn phòng tại Việt Nam và Nhật Bản, với hơn 600 nhân viên cùng hàng trăm các dự án, khách hàng trong nhiều lĩnh vực công nghệ khác nhau.
Với sứ mệnh trở thành một công ty công nghệ toàn cầu, đối tác tin cậy của khách hàng, Hybrid Technologies tin rằng, gia nhập với chúng tôi, bạn sẽ có cơ hội được phát triển năng lực toàn diện, tích lũy kinh nghiệm và hoàn thiện bản thân trong một môi trường chuyên nghiệp, hiện đại, cùng chúng tôi vươn tới tầm cao mới – nơi mỗi cá nhân, tập thể ngày càng trở nên tuyệt vời hơn!

5. Get inspired by your colleagues

6. Forget the notion of the “typical day”
Challenge and variety are constants here. From the work you do to the people you meet to the places you travel, we’ll keep you on your toes.
7. Strike a balance that works for you
You’re human—and so are we! We strive to make sure our employees achieve a healthy, happy work-life balance.
8.Count on us for career growth
We’re always growing and so should you. We prioritize the personal development of our team members with our Capgemini Group University.
9.Your Love for Travel

 10.Dig in your first day
Whether you join us as a recent graduate or a seasoned professional, you’ll start to work directly on challenging projects from day one.

Regen Tech is building the next generation of secure, privacy-preserving digital wallets using Multi-Party Computation (MPC). We are seeking a Senior Backend Developer to help architect, scale, and secure the core infrastructure of our platform. This role sits at the intersection of cloud engineering, cryptographic coordination, and cross-platform system design, working closely with experts across mobile, firmware, and cryptography teams.
You will lead and contribute to the development of services that orchestrate secure operations between cloud systems, mobile clients, and hardware devices, ensuring high performance, auditability, and fault tolerance.
 Key Responsibilities
Lead the design, implementation, and deployment of scalable cloud-based backend services to support MPC-driven wallet functionality.
Coordinate architectural decisions between cloud, mobile, and hardware teams, ensuring seamless integration of cryptographic protocols.
Define and implement secure authentication, transaction workflows, key orchestration logic, and encrypted communication flows.
Manage system observability, cloud performance, CI/CD pipelines, and security posture across environments.
Participate in or lead engagements with internal and external security auditors.
Mentor junior engineers and potentially build/manage a backend/cloud team.
Guide long-term cloud infrastructure strategy, especially around Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and Kubernetes-based environments.

Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.

Proficiency in Go, Java, JavaScript, or other modern backend languages.
Experience designing and building REST/gRPC APIs, microservices, and asynchronous workflows.
Deep understanding of cloud infrastructure (GCP, AWS, or Azure), with strong knowledge of containerization (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes), and CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, etc.).
Experience working with SQL/NoSQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB).
Strong security mindset, with experience building secure-by-default systems and supporting user privacy.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills across multi-disciplinary teams.
Nice-to-have:

Familiarity with blockchain protocols, smart contracts, or crypto wallet systems.

You will collaborate closely with AI Product Managers, Data Scientists, and Software Engineers to develop AI models and solutions tailored to business needs.
Your key responsibilities will include:
Data Pipeline Development: Designing, building, and maintaining scalable data transformation, ingestion, and storage pipelines to support AI and machine learning applications.
AI Model Deployment: Collaborating with data scientists and AI engineers to deploy machine learning and AI models into production environments.
Infrastructure Automation: Automating AI infrastructure to streamline development workflows for data scientists and AI engineers.
Model Development & Integration: Assisting in building AI models from the ground up, transforming machine learning models into APIs, and integrating them with other systems for real-world applications.
Statistical Analysis: Conducting statistical analysis to interpret model results and inform business decisions.
AI Experimentation: Running experiments and tests for machine learning models and AI applications, ensuring optimal performance.
Collaboration: Partnering with cross-functional teams, including electronics and robotics departments, to integrate AI solutions effectively. 
System Maintenance: Monitoring and retraining systems to ensure continuous improvement and alignment with evolving business goals.
Stakeholder Communication: Translating complex AI outcomes into actionable insights for business users and stakeholders.
Other tasks required by CTO/ CEO.

Your skills and experience
Educational Background:
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field.
Technical Expertise:
Extensive experience in building data pipelines and deploying AI/ML models into production environments.
Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java, C++, or R.
Strong knowledge of statistics, calculus, and probability for algorithm development and model evaluation.
Hands-on experience with machine learning frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, or Scikit-learn.
Cloud Experience:
+ 3 years of experience in deploying AI models, expertise in cloud services (e.g., AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud).
Must hold a relevant cloud certification, such as AWS Certified Data Analytics, AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty, or equivalent.
AI Specializations:
Familiarity with natural language processing, computer vision, and common AI model architectures.
Experience in transforming AI models into APIs for integration with other sytems.
Additional Skills:
Solid understanding of data engineering practices, including ETL, feature engineering, and data preprocessing.
Ability to work collaboratively in an agile and fast-paced environment.
Strong problem-solving and communication skills.
Demonstrated ability to run AI experiments and optimize performance through testing.
Preferred Qualifications:
Experience with robotics or electronics integration.
A track record of contributing to end-to-end AI product development.

Why you'll love working here

Work at the heart of cloud innovation and transformation across Vietnam and the region.
Collaborate with world-class cloud engineers and business leaders.
Join a young and dynamic team with awesome projects applying the latest technology
Working with specialists worldwide provides you with a fantastic opportunity to expand your skill set.

Title: QA Engineer (QA QC/Tester/CRM)
Job Description:

Job description
● Develop and execute test plans and cases, performing functional, regression, integration, performance testing.

 Nice to have:
● Have knowledge on Odoo, especially at CRM system.
● Be willing to learn and apply automation to the project. It is good to have experience with Selenium webdriver, CI: Jenkins
 Given the high volume of CVs applied, we can only manage to respond to candidates whose profiles aligns with the position within 5 working days. We appreciate your understanding and enthusiastic towards our company

Team building
Free and un-limited snack, tea, coffee and by-choice request.

About us
As a Fortune 500 company, we are on the front edge of an IT transformation for how people work and deliver solutions. Your skills and experience

YOU 
You want to be a key member of a strong team of creators who take pride in their work and support one another. Your impact will be recognized, and if career growth is important to you, we not only know how to support your development—we're passionate about it:  
 WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING 
Front-end Development 
Develop, test, and maintain highly performant and scalable code using modern front-end frameworks. 
Build reusable and modular components and libraries for future use. 
Ensure that the web applications are responsive, fast, and optimized for various devices and browsers. 
Write and maintain high-quality, clean, and well-documented code that follows best practices in JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML, and CSS/SASS. 
Architecture & Design 
Lead the design and development of complex front-end applications, ensuring scalability and performance.

Performance Optimization 
Optimize application performance by leveraging techniques such as lazy loading, code splitting, and asset optimization.

Cross-Functional Collaboration 
Collaborate with multiple product teams to implement design artifacts held in Figma and similar tools into finished static resources for incorporation into Simpson Strong-Tie’s digital products.  
Collaborate with product managers to define and implement product features and improvements. 
Lead technical discussions with backend engineers, designers, and other stakeholders to build cohesive and efficient systems. 
Partner with other teams across the organization to weigh in on project priorities, project estimation, and risk identification for roadmap projects. 
Contribute to multiple releases across Simpson Strong-Tie’s digital product portfolio.  
Mentorship & Code Reviews 
Mentor Interns, Engineer and Associate Senior Engineer, and providing guidance on best practices, architectural decisions, and professional growth. 
Perform regular code reviews to ensure high-quality code and provide constructive feedback. 
Lead efforts to establish and enforce coding standards and best practices across the team. 
Testing & Quality Assurance 
Ensure high code quality through the implementation of unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end (E2E) testing using frameworks. 
Participate in bug triaging and resolve technical issues quickly and efficiently. 
Continuous Improvement 
Drive continuous improvement in front-end development processes, tools, and frameworks. 
Stay up to date with emerging trends and best practices in front-end development and bring innovative ideas to the team. 
Work with the DevOps team to integrate front-end applications into CI/CD pipelines and ensure seamless deployment.

Your skills and experience
If you can do everything listed above, you’ve got what it takes. Perhaps some of the following would be helpful too: 
At least 5 years of overall software development experience, with an emphasis on web applications and front-end technologies 
Strong proficiency in a modern front-end framework such as React, Angular, Next, or Lightning Web Components 
Strong proficiency in HTML, SCSS/SASS/CSS, Javascript/Typescript 
Strong understanding of RESTful APIs, and real-time web technologies (e.g., WebSockets) 
Experience with front-end build tools (e.g., Webpack, Vite, Babel, ESLint, Prettier) 
Proficient with version control systems such as GIT  
Proficient with JIRA and Confluence  
Excellent organizational and communication skills  
Fluent English communication skills (both verbal and non-verbal) 
Understand and design for non-functional concerns such as performance, cost optimization, maintainability, developer experience, and responsive design  
Comfortable working across multiple product areas, building relationships, and connecting different workstreams into a unified system for all 
Familiarity with state management patterns and libraries 
Familiarity with cross-browser compatibility issues and ways to work around them 
Familiarity with web security principles and experience with front-end security vulnerabilities (e.g., XSS, CSRF). 
Familiarity with Figma, design systems, knowledge of frameworks/tooling such as atomic design principles, design tokens, and semantic naming 
Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodology

Exposure to cloud-based architecture like Azure

So, if you want to have the opportunity to work with an outstanding and progressive organization this position could be right for you.
 We are seeking an accomplished and highly experienced Project Manager to join our dynamic team. The successful candidate will play a pivotal role in managing project delivery and leading project teams to implement IT solutions that meet our clients' strategic objectives.
 Role responsibilities
Lead and manage IT projects from initiation through to successful completion, ensuring delivery within defined scope, timelines, and budget
Act as Scrum Master for multiple teams, facilitating Agile ceremonies and promoting the adoption of Agile best practices
Collaborate with stakeholders to clearly define project scope, objectives, and deliverables, ensuring alignment with business goals
Develop and maintain comprehensive project plans, including timelines, milestones, and resource allocations
Monitor project progress, proactively identifying and addressing risks and issues to ensure project success
Foster effective communication and collaboration across cross-functional teams and stakeholders
Provide regular project status updates and detailed reports to stakeholders and senior management
Ensure strict adherence to GFT’s project management methodologies, standards, and best practices
Champion continuous improvement initiatives to enhance project delivery processes and team performance.

Your skills and experience
Your Skills and Experience 
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, or a related field
Project Management Professional (PMP) or Certified ScrumMaster (CSM) certification is highly desirable
A minimum of 12 years of experience in project management and Agile methodologies, ideally within the IT or banking industry
Demonstrated success in managing complex projects and delivering high-quality results.
Strong leadership and team management skills, with the ability to inspire, motivate, and develop project teams
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with a proven ability to build strong relationships with stakeholders at all levels
Exceptional problem-solving and decision-making capabilities
Proficiency in project management tools such as Microsoft Project, JIRA, or equivalent.
Preferred Skills
Extensive experience in digital banking or financial services projects
In-depth knowledge of cloud platforms (GCP, AWS) and associated technologies
Familiarity with DevOps practices and tools
Banking domain knowledge is a plus
Note: Due to the high volume of applications we receive, we are unable to respond to every candidate individually. If you have not received a response from GFT regarding your application within 10 workdays, please consider that we have decided to proceed with other candidates. We truly appreciate your interest in GFT and thank you for your understanding.

Why you'll love working here
HR benefits

Salary band per level are reviewed once per year
13th month salary pro rata depending on the employee’s length of service (within a calender year), paid with the December salary
Monthly lunch allowance: 700,000 VND/employee

   > Performance bonus   > Salary increments

Optical: expense claim for eyewear

Vacation

Title: Data Analyst (SQL, Python)
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Engaging perks and benefits for your well-being
World-class technology for parcel tracking
Culture that embraces growth and teamwork
Skills and Experience:
Job description
Have a good grasp of analytics and want to utilize it for B2B software solutions in e-commerce logistics?
 Parcel Perform is looking for an amazing team member to support us in data analytics!
You have excellent statistics and analytics skills, 3-4 years of experience working with big and complex databases, you’re technically savvy and have a good grasp on query techniques? Are you also interested in e-commerce and like to take on new challenges? Help us drive Parcel Perform’s growth and join our team! We are looking for you!
 WE NEED YOU ON OUR TEAM!
As a Data Analyst, you will be responsible for compiling actionable insights from data and assisting sales, marketing, and technology teams to build data-driven processes. We at Parcel Perform will always put the customer first. We want them to get the most out of our data and showcase the endless possibilities of our service. You will be an important inflection point among their logistics data, challenges, and how our insights can support them. Your role will also involve driving initiatives to optimize the operational excellence of the data team.
 Such complexity can be hard, especially with a focus on good operation practices. But that is ok. We aren’t here for ease anyway. We are here for people who want to up their game.

Your skills and experience
WHAT YOU SHOULD BRING ALONG!
We at Parcel Perform believe in innovation, energy, and resourcefulness for everything we do. We will not stop to deliver an outstanding product that we can be proud of and need you to help us to inform the world. You need to feel the same way about our offering and bring along the following things:
  Fluent in SQL to work with large data sets and relational databases to extract insights and optimize query planners; experience with Python a plus.
Knowledge of statistics and experience using statistical packages for analyzing datasets (e.g., Excel, SPSS, SAS)
Hand-on experience working with real data for customer insights, business, and market analysis. Work experience with logistics data is a plus.
Good communication skills, and the ability to translate business requirements into non-technical, lay terms.
Strong analytical skills with the ability to collect, organize, analyze, and disseminate significant amounts of information with attention to detail and accuracy.
Able to work independently as well as with cross-functional teams.
Open-minded, friendly, and strong willingness to keep learning and pushing yourself to higher and higher levels.

Why you'll love working here
WHAT YOU WILL RECEIVE IN RETURN!
We at Parcel Perform are dedicated to being a platform for growth for all our team members, regardless of function and location.
  The opportunity to work in a fast-growing, super exciting and innovative business that will revolutionize the e-commerce logistics industry. You will be the needle of success on the growth of a global product that will become a key platform behind successful e-commerce logistics worldwide.
The ability to continuously learn and develop in an international setting with you being a critical driver behind the success of us achieving our mission.
An environment where everybody never stops growing and focuses on succeeding - we continuously work with you on your strengths and weaknesses across many important dimensions and look at ways for you to address them and further your development
Your entry ticket into being part of the Parcel Perform journey, where you will work with and alongside people from around the world that share the same passion and dedication.
 WHO ARE WE AT PARCEL PERFORM!
Parcel Perform (www.parcelperform.com) is a leading e-commerce delivery experience platform, empowering businesses to optimize the entire customer journey from checkout to delivery and returns. By unifying logistics data and providing actionable insights and intelligent automation, including leveraging AI capabilities, Parcel Perform helps businesses enhance customer satisfaction, streamline operations, and drive growth. With a global reach and an extensive carrier network, Parcel Perform is the trusted partner for ambitious e-commerce businesses, marketplaces, and 3PLs worldwide. We’re committed to continuously innovating, using data to optimize every step of the e-commerce delivery.

Title: Sr Frontend Developer ( ReactJs, JavaScript, UI-UX)
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Hybrid and flexible working environment
Innovative Product
Growth Opportunities
Skills and Experience:
Job description
About PAVE - A product of Discovery Loft
PAVE 🔧🚗is an innovative automotive technology company transforming the way the world inspects vehicles. Powered by Intelligent Damage Detection capabilities, PAVE enables anyone with a smartphone to complete a guided vehicle inspection simply by taking photos of their car.
Headquartered in Toronto, our team brings deep expertise from both the automotive and technology industries, blending the best of artificial intelligence and automotive intelligence.
For more information, visit 
Responsibilities
Collaborate closely with the UI/UX team to deeply understand the design system, component logic, and design methodology (e.g., atomic design, responsive principles, accessibility). Validate and ensure the technical feasibility of design requirements, and provide feedback to UI/UX when necessary.
Take ownership of translating high-fidelity UI/UX designs into pixel-perfect, maintainable frontend code using HTML, SCSS, and JavaScript. Ensure consistency and alignment between design specifications and implementation across various screens and platforms.
Leverage Tailwind CSS (utility-first CSS framework) for styling components. Design the UI components to be framework-agnostic and easily integratable with modern libraries: ReactJs, SvelteJs, or Laravel Livewire projects.
Optimize UI components for performance, responsiveness, and cross-browser compatibility across web-capable devices and embedded webviews.
Use Storybook (or a similar component workbench) to develop and document UI components in isolation. Maintain a living style guide and interactive documentation so designers and developers can browse and test components. Write unit and integration tests for components to guarantee quality and catch regressions early.
Work with various front-end teams to integrate the new UI framework into their applications. Provide support and gather feedback from these internal teams, iterating on components or adding new features to the framework based on real-world usage and requirements.
Write robust, scalable code and manage upgrades of frontend frameworks and third-party modules with a strong focus on coding standards and security.
Implement and maintain testing for UI components using tools like Jest, Mocha, or Chai to ensure reliability and stability.
Participate in code reviews, share best practices, and contribute to frontend architecture decisions across teams.
Stay up-to-date with the latest front-end technologies, trends, and best practices. Continuously evaluate and incorporate improvements (e.g. new tools, libraries, or techniques) to keep the custom framework modern and maintainable over time.

Your skills and experience
What We’d Love From You
We’d be delighted if you could share a web product you helped build, where your frontend implementation contributed to a smooth, responsive, and user-friendly UI. We’re also interested in hearing about how you collaborated with designers and ensured a great user experience through code.
Be open minded to things you do not know,  consistently learn  and grow the skills necessary for the job Be ready to adjust and implement new plans in a fast paced environment Be confident and responsible; responsible down to a single line of code. 
Always be working on self improvement; willing to review your progress and see how you can make it better 
Getting the job done is a priority. 
Have good sportsmanship and be competitive; we have structured the responsibilities to be somewhat like a game! 
Be respectful and helpful to others and your working environment
Treat yourself well and save the Earth.
Be motivated, creative and passionate - it will ignite the rest!
Good English communication skills, both verbal and written.
Requirements
Experience:
5+ years of frontend development experience, with at least 2 years in a senior or tech lead role.
Proven track record delivering high-quality web applications in cross-functional teams.
Prior experience collaborating closely with design teams (especially UI/UX Managers or Product Designers).
Technical Skills:
Solid understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and core web fundamentals.
Experience with CSS frameworks or methodologies (e.g. Tailwind CSS, BEM, Sass/LESS). Familiarity with Tailwind CSS is a strong plus, or willingness to learn it for implementing utility-first styling at scale.
Expertise in JavaScript, with deep proficiency in TypeScript for large codebases.
Strong proficiency with at least one modern front-end framework, especially React.js (hooks, context, state management, etc.). Familiarity with Svelte.js (or similar frameworks like Angular or Vue) is a plus, and an ability to quickly learn new frameworks is expected to achieve cross-framework integration.
Experience using tools like Storybook for building and showcasing UI components in isolation. Comfortable documenting components, writing usage examples, and utilizing such tools for UI testing and development workflow.
Proficient with version control (Git) and collaborative development workflows (pull requests, code reviews). Experience with modern build tools/bundlers (Webpack, Vite, Rollup) and package managers (npm/yarn) for distributing libraries.
Strong knowledge of web accessibility standards (WCAG) and experience ensuring UIs are accessible. Exposure to writing tests for the front-end (unit tests with Jest, component tests, and end-to-end tests with tools like Cypress) to validate UI behavior.
Ability to optimize front-end code for performance. Familiar with performance debugging/profiling tools and techniques to improve load times and rendering (e.g., Lighthouse, Chrome DevTools).
Soft Skills:
Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills. Capable of architecting solutions to complex UI challenges and making design decisions that scale for a large codebase.
Strong communication skills with the ability to explain technical decisions to non-technical stakeholders, and to understand design considerations from the UX team’s perspective.
Experience mentoring or leading frontend developers, conducting code reviews, and promoting engineering excellence.
Proactive, ownership-driven mindset with the ability to work independently or lead frontend efforts within a cross-functional squad.
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.

Why you'll love working here
1. Competitive Compensation & Perks
Attractive salary package.
15 days of annual leave.
Year-end bonus equal to one month’s salary.
Premium healthcare coverage for you and your family.
Thoughtful appreciation gifts throughout the year.
2. Growth & Learning Opportunities
Work on cutting-edge, large-scale products in the car inspection field.
Clear career paths for both technical experts and aspiring leaders.
Continuous learning programs to sharpen your skills and grow your career.
Learn from everything, everywhere—but be a smart copy-paster, not a copycat!
Be ready to embrace and implement new ideas in a fast-paced environment.
3. An Inspiring Workplace
Flexible hybrid work model and a strong focus on work-life balance.
A modern, fully-equipped Office with a well-stocked pantry.
Be motivated, creative, and passionate—we can’t ask for more!
Respect and care for your teammates, your environment, and even yourself.
Treat yourself well, and while you’re at it, save the Earth too.
4. A Mindset for Growth
Have the courage to move fast, stay flexible, and take full responsibility for every single line of code.
Always look back at your work and strive to make it better—nothing is perfect, and that’s where you come in.
It’s okay to be late sometimes, but make sure you’re fully accountable and aware of your actions.
5. A Dynamic and Open Culture
We don’t stick rigidly to the gameplan, so feel free to add or remove your own “blah blah” from this list. 😉

Title: Python Technical Leader (Smart Contract)
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
We build a professional & fun working environment.
We focus on your growth, yes the long-term growth.
We develop the future-ready digital bank platform.
Skills and Experience:
Job description
About GFT
GFT is a global leader in digital transformation, offering innovative technology solutions across financial services, insurance, and manufacturing industries. We combine deep domain expertise with leading-edge technologies like cloud, blockchain, AI, and smart contracts to build scalable and future-ready systems for our clients. With a strong commitment to diversity, sustainability, and continuous innovation, GFT has been recognized as a Great Place to Work across multiple regions.
 Role Overview
We are looking for a Python Technical Lead (Smart Contract) to join our digital banking practice. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and leading the implementation of Smart Contracts. You will act as the technical owner for smart contract solutions, mentoring developers, collaborating with stakeholders, and driving high-quality delivery in complex environments.
 Key Responsibilities
Lead end-to-end smart contract architecture, development, testing, and deployment
Translate business requirements into scalable and maintainable smart contract designs
Collaborate with business analysts, product owners, and clients to define workflows and financial product logic
Review and approve designs, code, and testing strategies to ensure reliability and compliance with industry best practices
Manage CI/CD pipelines and DevOps processes for smart contract deployments
Troubleshoot and resolve issues in development, staging, and production environments (e.g., posting failures, schedule conflicts, interest miscalculations)
Mentor and guide a team of smart contract developers, conducting code reviews and setting quality standards
Own and manage technical delivery timelines, sprint planning, and risk mitigation across multiple client engagements
Coordinate closely with trainers for Thought Machine Smart Contract to gain hands-on experience and continuously enhance domain expertise

Your skills and experience
Required Skills & Experience
10+ years of backend development experience, with 2+ years in Python (strong core Python expertise required)
2+ years of hands-on experience developing smart contracts
Deep knowledge of Vault smart contract architecture, hooks, posting instructions, and version upgrades
Experience in designing and implementing complex financial products such as savings accounts, loans, credit cards, and schedules
Solid understanding of CI/CD pipelines, unit/integration/e2e testing, Git branching strategies (Git Flow, Trunk, GitHub Flow)
Proven experience leading agile teams, sprint planning, and backlog grooming
Familiarity with DevOps tools like GitHub, CircleCI, SonarQube, Artifactory, and monitoring/debugging tools
Knowledge of CQRS pattern and scalable microservices architecture
Ability to lead client-facing technical discussions, workshops, and requirement-gathering sessions
Ability to be on-site if required
 Nice to Have
Experience in retail banking or financial institutions, especially around accounting principles (e.g., double-entry bookkeeping)
Exposure to Vault workflows, Vault UI, or the product lifecycle of core banking systems
Thought Machine certification(s) or experience with Vault development environments
  (Due to the high volume of applications we receive, we are unable to respond to every candidate individually. If you have not received a response from GFT regarding your application within 10 workdays, please consider that we have decided to proceed with other candidates. We truly appreciate your interest in GFT and thank you for your understanding.)

Why you'll love working here
HR benefits
Competitive salary
Salary band per level are reviewed once per year
13th month salary pro rata depending on the employee’s length of service (within a calender year), paid with the December salary
Monthly lunch allowance: 700,000 VND/employee

Performance evaluation is once per year, for 2 purposes:
   > Performance bonus   > Salary increments
Health care
Private health insurance: including accident, outpatient, in-patient, maternity, and dental for all permanent employees who pass 2-month probation.
Optical: expense claim for eyewear
Annual health check-ups.
Vacation
Maximum 18-day vacation leave/year (with the ability to carry over 05 days till 31st March of the following year)
Adding one more annual leave day for each two-year anniversary.
Healthy lifestyle
Sports and hobby clubs: company has an annual fund for fitness activities, which is allocated per month as team’s vote.
Range of healthy snacks, tea, coffee, milk and beer on tap
Social
Company townhall: each 6 weeks
CSR activities: as per company’s CSR guideline

Chủ động trong công việc và linh hoạt trong xử lý tình huống.
Cẩn thận, kiên trì và nỗ lực trong công việc.
Có trách nhiệm với bản thân và công việc, chịu được áp lực cao

Why you'll love working here
We hope VNG is a place where you build your career. Whether you want to pursue to be a manager or focus on professional development, we acknowledge and appreciate your talents. Therefore, we open up to you more promotion opportunities in VNG, and designed program to help you succeed in every single career path. 

NO SUIT, NO TIE: At VNG, we do not have many rules because we respect you and want to make comfortable atmosphere to help employees perform their jobs well.
Company “pay” for you: Lunch, parking, swimming, learning English or gym for free and you know you are really in care.
NO BARRIERS: Office of VNG is an open space because we always try to remove all barriers to help members easily shares with each other.
Being a big family: Like a gift for family day. A party for the kids. We know how much your family matters.
NO RANK At VNG, members are encouraged to contribute ideas and debate with the others.
Be explored: Ph.D., un-academic guy, bookish girl, fashion designers ... VNGers are different and this diversity makes life more colorful.
NO "OFFICE": Office is like your home. You can hang paintings, plant trees, even feed aquarium on the desk.
Be showed your best: VNGers like to "mortification" with the group games such as: Fansipan climbing, waterfall rafting, go over heat mats; there activities not only are tightening friendship, but also practice their bravery.
GAMING: Even if you do not make the game, stealing beans in the boss’s garden or versusing with your colleagues in a sword competition play online is also an interesting way to relax.

Changing the world: Creating an entertainment channel, building a social network and developing a game. On the Internet world, every single thing you did can change the lives of many people.

Let’s join VNG to share our mission: 'MAKE THE INTERNET CHANGE VIETNAMESE LIVES'

Solid understanding of hardware interfaces and communication protocols: SPI, I2C, UART, CAN, Ethernet, etc.
Experience with Embedded Linux or RTOS (e.g., FreeRTOS, OSEK, TOCK).

 10.Dig in your first day
Whether you join us as a recent graduate or a seasoned professional, you’ll start to work directly on challenging projects from day one.

Mô Tả Công Việc
Tham gia vào toàn bộ vòng đời phát triển sản phẩm, từ thiết kế đến triển khai và bảo trì.
Phát triển và tối ưu hóa các ứng dụng web phía người dùng (Frontend) sử dụng ReactJS, Next.js và các thư viện liên quan.
Thiết kế, xây dựng và duy trì các API RESTful hiệu quả, an toàn và có khả năng mở rộng cao phía máy chủ (Backend) sử dụng Node.js (ưu tiên ElysiaJS).
Làm việc với các hệ thống cơ sở dữ liệu (ví dụ: MySQL, PostgreSQL, NoSQL) để lưu trữ, truy vấn và xử lý dữ liệu lớn.
Xây dựng và triển khai các dịch vụ theo kiến trúc Microservices, đảm bảo tính linh hoạt và khả năng mở rộng của hệ thống.
Nghiên cứu và tích hợp các giải pháp Trí tuệ nhân tạo (AI) vào sản phẩm để nâng cao trải nghiệm người dùng và giá trị kinh doanh.
Hợp tác chặt chẽ với các Product Owner, UI/UX Designer, và các thành viên khác trong nhóm phát triển để đảm bảo chất lượng và tiến độ dự án.

Your skills and experience
Yêu cầu công việc
Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc thực tế với vai trò Lập trình viên Full-stack, tập trung vào ReactJS cho Frontend và NodeJS cho Backend.
Thành thạo ReactJS và TypeScript. Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các thư viện và công cụ nâng cao trong hệ sinh thái React (ví dụ: Hooks, Context API, Redux/Zustand/Jotai, TanStack (React Query, React Table)) là một lợi thế lớn.
Kinh nghiệm vững chắc với Node.js và các framework liên quan. Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm với ElysiaJS; kinh nghiệm với Express.js hoặc NestJS cũng được đánh giá cao.
Hiểu biết sâu sắc và có kinh nghiệm áp dụng các nguyên lý OOP, Design Patterns, Clean Architecture và một số kỹ thuật chuyên sâu vào phát triển phần mềm để thiết kế hệ thống xử lý lượng truy cập lớn và có thể tăng đột biến.
Tư duy logic sắc bén, kỹ năng phân tích và giải quyết vấn đề xuất sắc, chú trọng vào chi tiết và tính triệt để.
Khả năng làm việc độc lập và phối hợp nhóm hiệu quả.
Điểm cộng (Ưu tiên):
Có kinh nghiệm hoặc hiểu biết về PHP, đặc biệt là framework Laravel.
Biết hoặc đã từng làm việc với Angular.
Hiểu biết về các giải pháp và công cụ CI/CD, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).

Why you'll love working here
Quyền lợi
Được đào tạo và phát triển bản thân trong môi trường nhiều thử thách , trải nghiệm phát triển sản phẩm phục vụ trực tiếp khách hàng Việt Nam và khu vực
Phát huy khả năng tìm hiểu áp dụng công nghệ mới vào sản phẩm thực tế, nâng cao kỹ năng lập trình, tiếp cận xử lý tối ưu dữ liệu lớn
Làm việc môi trường năng động cùng với đội ngũ chăm sóc khách hàng nhiệt tình dễ thương.

Aperia is a Texas-based fintech and managed consultancy firm that creates custom SaaS applications and other software-based solutions for the payments, banking, and processing industry. Founded in 1999, Aperia offers business intelligence, risk management, compliance, and customer intelligence platforms. With offices in Dallas, Washington DC, and Vietnam, Aperia is a fast-paced, global organization that strives to improve efficiency in compliance, risk, and customer service operations. Aperia’s clients include banks, processors, payment facilitators, merchant service providers, independent sales organizations, and government entities. A career at Aperia promises a great challenge, culture, and opportunities to forge your own path. 
 Job Description: 
At Aperia Solutions, our success is driven by the innovation and dedication of our talented engineering team. We are seeking a QA Engineer with a strong background in automation—particularly with JMeter—to help us ensure the highest level of quality across our product suite. This role will focus on developing robust testing strategies, automating functional tests, and collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to uphold our commitment to secure and scalable solutions. 
 Key Responsibilities: 
Design, implement, and maintain comprehensive test strategies, test plans, and test cases across functional and integration testing.
Develop and optimize automated scripts, primarily using JMeter, to support a CI/CD pipeline.
Execute manual and automated testing, including regression, functional, UI, and API testing.
Utilize and help refine Aperia’s test frameworks for Functional Automation, Security, and Penetration Testing.
Analyze and translate user stories and business requirements into detailed test scenarios and scripts.
Ensure thorough test coverage while balancing time constraints and business priorities.
Select, recommend, and support tools such as Postman, database testing, and log analysis tools (e.g., Splunk) for end-to-end validation.
Lead the testing effort within agile teams; collaborate on design and code reviews to ensure testability.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including Product, DevOps, and Security to embed quality into our development lifecycle.
Mentor junior QA engineers and foster a culture of continuous improvement. 
 Functional Responsibilities: 
Actively engage with Scrum teams to resolve product issues quickly and effectively.
Conduct and lead regression testing based on impact analysis.
Communicate findings clearly and proactively to relevant stakeholders.
Manage priorities and multitask across multiple projects while maintaining high attention to detail.
Promote adherence to Agile, Scrum, TDD, BDD, and other best practices in software development and testing.
Communicate effectively through Teams, SharePoint, GitHub, and other collaborative platforms.
Contribute to an inclusive and high-performance team culture that values transparency, ownership, and accountability.

Your skills and experience
Technical Skills: 
4+ years of hands-on QA experience with increasing levels of responsibility.
Strong JMeter automation experience with at least 1-2 years for functional testing (Note: not used for performance testing at Aperia).
Experience with Postman, SQL/DB testing, Splunk, and writing/maintaining test plans and strategies.
Proven expertise in API and UI automation.
Deep understanding of QA frameworks and SDLC methodologies.
Experience working within CI/CD pipelines and test code integration.
Proficient in REST/SOAP, JSON, XML, and web technologies such as ReactJS.
Familiarity with Secure Software Development Framework (SSDF) and Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices.
Experience testing high-performance, high-throughput web applications.
Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and root cause analysis skills.

Title: Software Engineer – Mining Machine & Mass Production
Skills and Experience:
Job description
We are looking for a skilled Software Engineer to join our mining machinedevelopment team. The ideal candidate will have solid experience in embedded Linux firmware, ASIC-based mining software, and mass production environments. You will play a key role in building reliable, high-performance firmware that powers cutting-edge cryptocurrency mining machines.
Key Responsibilities
Develop and maintain firmware for embedded Linux platforms (e.g., CGMiner or similar mining frameworks)
Design and implement firmware for MCU-based power supply control systems
Collaborate with the hardware engineering team to ensure seamless system integration
Perform software quality assurance (QA) and stress testing prior to mass deployment
Conduct diagnostics and failure analysis during production and post- deployment
Perform thermal simulation and analysis to optimize heat dissipation and cooling systems
Ensure firmware stability, scalability, and performance in mass production environments
Contribute to the automation of software testing and deployment pipelines

Your skills and experience
Job Requirements
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or a related field.
Direct experience with ASIC-based mining software development or optimization.
Proven experience in mass production of mining machines or embedded systems.
Solid understanding of blockchain protocols and cryptocurrency mining mechanisms.
Experience with embedded Linux and mining tools such as CGMiner, BFGMiner, or equivalents.
Familiarity with power management ICs, thermal control, and cooling system optimization.
Proficiency in MCU firmware development (e.g., STM32, ESP32, or similar).
Ability to conduct and interpret thermal simulations using relevant tools.
Experience in automated software testing frameworks for embedded systems is a plus.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; ability to work in fast-paced environments.
Preferred Qualifications
Experience in hardware-software co-design.
Knowledge of production-line testing and debugging tools.
Understanding of reliability engineering for high-uptime systems.

Why you'll love working here
Competitive salary based on experience and skills.
Professional working environment with a clear promotion roadmap.
Salary review and performance bonus every year.

Title: Backend Engineer (Golang)
Skills and Experience:
Job description
JOB OVERVIEW
We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Backend Engineer with a strong background in Golang, PostgreSQL, and Azure to join our dynamic team
In this role, you will be responsible for building and maintaining scalable, reliable, and secure backend systems for healthcare applications.
You will work alongside cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality solutions that align with the healthcare industry's needs, ensuring compliance with relevant regulations and providing efficient performance for healthcare professionals and patients
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
Backend Development:
Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs using Golang to support healthcare applications and systems
Ensure that the backend architecture is scalable, efficient, and easily maintainable
Database Management:
Utilize PostgreSQL for database design, optimization, and troubleshooting
Design and manage complex database schemas and queries , and optimize for performance and scalability
Cloud Infrastructure:
Manage and deploy backend services using Azure cloud infrastructure, ensuring high availability, scalability, and performance
Collaborate with DevOps to automate deployment pipelines, monitor system health, and handle issues related to cloud infrastructure 
Data Security and Compliance:
Implement best practices for security and compliance with healthcare regulations, including HIPAA, to protect sensitive patient data
Ensure proper encryption and access control measures are in place Performance Optimization: Continuously monitor and improve the performance, scalability, and reliability of backend systems, ensuring minimal downtime and efficient resource utilization
Collaboration:
Work closely with frontend engineers, product managers, and designers to build seamless and integrated user experiences
Participate in code reviews and mentor junior engineers to maintain high-quality code standards
Troubleshooting and Support: Investigate and resolve production issues, debug complex problems, and provide on-call support when necessary

Your skills and experience
REQUIRED AND QUALIFICATIONS
Experience:
Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
3+ years of experience in backend development, preferably in a healthcare or regulated environment
Strong proficiency in Golang for building robust and scalable backend systems
Expertise in working with PostgreSQL, including schema design, optimization, and performance tuning
Hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure cloud services, including but not limited to:
Compute (Azure App Service, Azure Functions, AKS)
Data (Azure SQL Database, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Blob Storage)
Integration (Azure Service Bus, Azure Event Grid, Logic Apps)
Monitoring and Logging (e.g., Azure Monitor, Application Insights)
Excellent communication skills in English, both written and verbal, to collaborate with global teams and stakeholders
Technical Expertise:
In-depth understanding of RESTful APIs, microservices architecture, and service-oriented design
Strong knowledge of data modeling, SQL, and relational databases.
Experience with Docker and containerization techniques for scalable application deployment
Familiarity with version control systems, particularly Git/Bitbucket
Soft Skills:
Strong problem-solving skills and a passion for tackling complex challenges
Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in a remote or hybrid team environment
Preferred Skills
Healthcare Industry Experience: Experience working in the healthcare technology sector or familiarity with healthcare software solutions
Knowledge of healthcare workflows, data privacy laws, and industry best practices related to patient data
CI/CD Tools: Familiarity with Azure DevOps, Jenkins, CircleCI, or similar tools
Experience with infrastructure-as-code tools (Terraform, ARM templates, ...)
Experience with performance optimization and scalability techniques
Knowledge of healthcare interoperability and working with EHR/EMR systems
Familiarity with security best practices for cloud-based healthcare applications
Previous exposure to Agile/Scrum methodologies

Why you'll love working here
.

Title: Odoo Developer (Python, JavaScript)
Skills and Experience:
Job description
Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm một Odoo Developer tài năng và nhiệt huyết để dẫn dắt việc triển khai hệ thống Odoo ERP cho doanh nghiệp vận hành công viên giải trí là khu Đô thị Du lịch hàng đầu Đông Nam Á. Với hệ thống chuỗi cung ứng du lịch, dịch vụ, nghĩ dưỡng, giáo dục, khoa học công nghệ và đô thị thông minh hàng đầu, rộng gần 400ha, vốn đầu tư lên đến 3,5 tỷ đô. Bạn sẽ là nhân tố cốt lõi trong việc thiết lập, tùy chỉnh, và tối ưu hóa các module Odoo (ERP, CRM, HRM, POS, v.v.) để đáp ứng nhu cầu quản lý phức tạp của công viên, từ bán vé, quản lý khách hàng, đến chuỗi cung ứng và nhân sự. Đây là cơ hội để bạn đặt nền móng cho một hệ thống ERP hiện đại, góp phần nâng cao trải nghiệm khách hàng và hiệu quả vận hành.
Trách nhiệm chính:
Phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ từ các phòng ban (bán vé, dịch vụ khách hàng, nhân sự, kho, tài chính) và chuyển đổi thành các giải pháp kỹ thuật trên Odoo.
Cấu hình và tùy chỉnh các module Odoo (ví dụ: CRM, Bán hàng, HRM, POS) để phù hợp với quy trình kinh doanh của công viên giải trí.
Phát triển các tính năng mới hoặc module tùy chỉnh bằng Python, XML, và JavaScript.
Quản lý và tối ưu hóa cơ sở dữ liệu PostgreSQL để đảm bảo hiệu suất hệ thống.
Tích hợp Odoo với các hệ thống bên ngoài (ví dụ: hệ thống bán vé, ứng dụng di động, hoặc thiết bị IoT trong công viên).
Hỗ trợ triển khai Odoo trên hạ tầng on-premise hoặc cloud (Odoo.sh, AWS, v.v.).
Kiểm tra, sửa lỗi, và đảm bảo hệ thống hoạt động ổn định trước khi đưa vào vận hành.
Tài liệu hóa mã nguồn, quy trình, và hướng dẫn sử dụng cho đội ngũ nội bộ.
Hỗ trợ đào tạo Key Users và End Users về cách sử dụng hệ thống Odoo.
Cộng tác với CTO để lập kế hoạch triển khai từng giai đoạn và mở rộng đội ngũ IT.

Your skills and experience
Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Khoa học máy tính, hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan.
Có ít nhất 2-3 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển hoặc triển khai Odoo (phiên bản Community hoặc Enterprise).
Thành thạo Python, XML, và JavaScript để phát triển và tùy chỉnh module Odoo.
Hiểu biết sâu về cơ sở dữ liệu PostgreSQL và khả năng tối ưu hóa hiệu suất.
Kinh nghiệm cấu hình và quản trị hệ thống trên Linux (Ubuntu khuyến khích) hoặc môi trường đám mây (AWS, Google Cloud, Odoo.sh).
Hiểu biết về các quy trình kinh doanh trong ERP (ví dụ: CRM, HRM, quản lý kho, kế toán).
Kỹ năng phân tích nghiệp vụ và làm việc với các phòng ban không thuộc IT.
Kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt, có khả năng làm việc độc lập và theo nhóm.
Tiếng Anh khá (đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật và giao tiếp cơ bản với cộng đồng Odoo toàn cầu).
Ưu tiên:
Kinh nghiệm triển khai Odoo cho các doanh nghiệp trong ngành dịch vụ, giải trí, hoặc bán lẻ.
Đã từng tích hợp Odoo với các hệ thống bên thứ ba (API, ứng dụng di động, hoặc thiết bị IoT).
Có chứng chỉ Odoo hoặc tham gia các khóa học chính thức từ Odoo.
Hiểu biết về quy trình vận hành công viên giải trí (bán vé, quản lý xếp hàng, trải nghiệm khách hàng).

Why you'll love working here
Làm việc trong một dự án đầy thách thức, xây dựng hệ thống ERP cho công viên giải trí hàng đầu.
Cơ hội học hỏi và phát triển cùng các công nghệ hiện đại.
Môi trường làm việc năng động, sáng tạo, và hỗ trợ phát triển nghề nghiệp.
Xe ca đưa rước ở Hồ Kỳ Hòa hoặc hỗ trợ nhà ở cộng đồng nếu ở lại công ty

Title: Senior Data Scientist
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Young & Dynamic Environment
Large-scale Product
New and Challenging product
Skills and Experience:
Job description
Job summary: 
As a Senior Data Scientist for Messaging App, you will play a critical role in developing and deploying machine learning models to enhance the security, productivity, and intelligence of our messaging platform. You will work on a variety of challenging problems, from detecting and preventing fraud and abuse to building intelligent agent solutions that assist users within the chat environment. You will have a strong background in classical machine learning techniques, natural language processing (NLP), and experience with both large language models (LLMs) and small language models (SLMs). You will work closely with product managers, engineers, and other data scientists to deliver impactful data-driven solutions.
 Key Responsibilities:
Model Development & Deployment:
Design, develop, train, evaluate, and deploy machine learning models for a variety of applications within KChat, including:
   ■ Security:
          ● Fraud detection and prevention (e.g., identifying phishing scams, spam,                      malicious links).
          ● Abuse detection (e.g., identifying hate speech, harassment, and other policy              violations).
          ● Account takeover detection.
          ● Anomaly detection.
  ■ Productivity:
          ● Smart reply suggestions.
          ● Message summarization.
          ● Task automation (e.g., scheduling meetings, setting reminders).
          ● Content recommendations.
          ● Translation.
       ■ Agent AI:
              ● Building and integrating intelligent agent solutions (chatbots) within KChat                    to assist users with various tasks.
              ● Developing natural language understanding (NLU) and dialogue     management capabilities for agents.
             ● Fine-tuning and customizing LLMs and SLMs for specific tasks and domains.
Work with large datasets of text, user activity, and other relevant data.
Implement data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model selection techniques.
Use a variety of machine learning algorithms, including classical ML models (e.g., logistic regression, SVM, random forests), deep learning models (e.g., transformers, LSTMs), and language models (LLMs and SLMs).
Deploy models to production and monitor their performance.
Data Analysis & Insights:
Analyze user behavior and messaging data to identify opportunities for improvement.
Communicate findings and recommendations to product and engineering teams.
Collaboration:
Work closely with product managers to define product requirements and translate them into data science solutions.
Collaborate with engineers to integrate models into the KChat platform.
Work with other data scientists to share knowledge and best practices.
Research & Innovation:
Stay up-to-date on the latest data science and machine learning research.
Explore and evaluate new techniques and technologies.

Your skills and experience
Qualifications:
Education: Master's degree or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Statistics, or a related field.
Minimum of 5+ years of experience in data science and machine learning, with a proven track record of developing and deploying models in a production environment.
Strong experience with classical machine learning techniques (e.g., regression, classification, clustering).
Extensive experience with natural language processing (NLP), including text classification, sentiment analysis, named entity recognition, and topic modelling.
Hands-on experience with large language models (LLMs) and small language models (SLMs), including fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and deployment.
Experience with specific models like BERT, RoBERTa, GPT variants, T5, LLaMA, and smaller, efficient models is highly desirable.
Experience with deep learning frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch).
Experience with programming languages such as Python (preferred) and R.
Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases.
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) is a plus.
Experience in the messaging, social media, or cybersecurity industry is a strong plus.
Experience working in Vietnam or Southeast Asia is a plus.
 Skills:
Exceptional technical skills in machine learning, NLP, and deep learning.
Strong problem-solving and analytical abilities.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
Passion for building innovative and impactful data-driven solutions.
Fluency in English; Vietnamese proficiency is a plus.

Why you'll love working here
Competitive salary and benefits package.
Opportunity to work on a product that impacts millions of users.
A dynamic and supportive work environment.
Premium health insurance for you and your family.
Professional growth and development opportunities.
Annual leave 12 - 14 days per year + 1 Birthday Leave + 1 X’Mas
Performance review: once per year
Internal training/sharing and professional Training courses
Team building, company trip, year end party, monthly activities,….
Devices: Macbook and screen (If needed)
Free tea and coffee
Comfortable working Area
Working hour: 9am - 6pm from Monday to Friday

Title: Mid/Senior Backend Engineer (Python)
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Remote First & 100% Salary During Probation
20 Annual Leave Days & 1 Leisure Day
Top-tier Remuneration & Premium Healthcare Package
Skills and Experience:
Job description
Who We Are
Employment Hero is on a mission to make employment easier and more valuable for everyone. Our Employment Operating System brings hiring, HR, payroll and benefits into an all-in-one solution.
 Since our inception in 2014, we've scaled to a $2 billion valuation and gained a presence in 6 countries globally - Australia, New Zealand, Singapore, Malaysia, the UK and Canada. We now service over 300,000 businesses and more than 2 million employees.
 The EH Way
At Employment Hero, we're proud of our unique DNA, which we call The EH Way.
We are Mission First - everything we do (from what we work on, to how we allocate capital and where we focus) is driven by our Mission
We are Remote First - we champion a remote environment with a preference for asynchronous communication and a high degree of autonomy
We are AI First - we are committed to using AI to accelerate our mission; AI is not just a tool, it's a fundamental part of how we operate, innovate, and scale
We are Apolitical - we do not take a position on political or social topics, unless it relates to our Mission
We Live by Our Values - we role model our values 100% of the time
We Expect High Performance - we set a high standard and we're not satisfied with being average
This role
As one of our Senior Python Engineers, you'll be accountable for building and deploying the innovative features that change our customers' lives every day. From our trailblazing AI hiring tool to our fully automated payroll solution, every component of our Employment Operating System is carefully designed to disrupt the employment industry for the better, improving the lives of business owners and entrepreneurs everywhere.
 Our world-class Product and Engineering teams delivered almost 1,000 new features last year. As one of our Senior Engineers, you'll play a vital role in the continued acceleration of our product strategy.
 Responsibilities
Architect, develop, and maintain scalable and reliable backend systems to support machine learning infrastructure
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define requirements, design solutions, and implement features that underpin machine learning workflows
Continuously optimize and enhance existing infrastructure to boost the performance and resilience of our machine learning models and data pipelines
Work on data ingestion, processing, and storage systems to ensure the availability of high-quality data for training and inference
Implement robust monitoring, logging, and alerting solutions to ensure the health and performance of our machine learning infrastructure
Stay informed about the latest industry trends and emerging technologies in the fields of machine learning and data engineering
Mentor and provide technical guidance to junior engineers, fostering a culture of learning and professional growth

Your skills and experience
Requirements
To thrive at Employment Hero, you'll need to embody The EH Way - operating with focus, agility, and an obsession with impact. For this role, you'll also bring
Strong expertise in Python and its frameworks (e.g., Django, Flask) with a focus on building scalable and maintainable code
Good understanding of database concepts and experience working with relational databases like PostgreSQL or MySQL
Experience in developing software, using microservices or SOA architecture for deployment on public clouds, preferably AWS
Experience with containerization and orchestration technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes)
Excellent problem-solving skills and a strong understanding of software design patterns
Quality coding practices, including test-driven development, unit testing and secure coding awareness
Experience using Agile methodologies and working with Product teams
Have experience in mentoring team mates, or even leading a squad
English language abilities, both written and verbal - you'll be working with people across the world, including from Australia
 Experience is important, but for us the biggest measure of success is people who can live and breathe our EH Way of working. Show us what you can bring to the table, and we’ll empower you to let your talents shine.

Why you'll love working here
Why you love working here?
We are remote-first, where you can work from the comfort of your home, and enjoy flexible working time
Work your local hours! 40-hour work week, Monday to Friday
100% Salary During Probation
A generous budget to spend on setting up your home office
We set you up for success with the latest and greatest hardware, tools and tech
Budgets towards continuing your learning
Annual Global Gathering in 1 week - Road to Dubai in 2025!!!
Refer friends to open jobs and receive a cash bonus for every successful referral you make
Participate in our Employee Share Options Program - you’ll be a part owner of Employment Hero.

 Your Job Responsibilities

With our focus on inclusion and diversity, and in partnership with our Employee Resource Groups, NAB is a place where First Nations colleagues, colleagues of all genders, sexualities and ages, carers and colleagues with disability, and colleagues from all cultures, races and religions have the opportunity to thrive, connect and grow.

🚀 We're Hiring in VIETNAM: Junior+ Ruby on Rails Developer! – 100% Remote-Friendly 

At KEENEO, we’ve been crafting top-tier digital solutions since 1998. We believe in simplicity, transparency, and excellence, creating lasting partnerships and driving cutting-edge technology forward.

✅ Work from anywhere – Remote-first culture.

✅ A flexible, start-up spirit with an agile culture.

🔍 About the Role
We're currently looking for a Senior Ruby on Rails Developer to join our team for a long-term collaboration with a leading logistics platform that powers on-demand delivery across food, grocery, and retail sectors globally. You'll work directly with a distributed international team, influence technical decisions, and drive engineering excellence.

Your skills and experience
3+ years of hands-on experience with Ruby on Rails 5+
Solid understanding of database theory and experience with MySQL/PostgreSQL
Proven experience working with large monoliths and microservices

💡 Note! If you’re based outside HCMC, we prefer that you use your personal laptop for work.

Why you'll love working here
Work Your Way
Freedom and support - that's our promise. Work remotely or on-site, set your own schedule, and create a work environment that suits you - we’re here to provide the resources and opportunities to help you excel. From training programs to mentorship and career advancement support, we empower you to reach your aspirations. We take pride in fostering a collaborative atmosphere where you can thrive and cultivating an environment where every voice is heard. Our culture is built around care—care for your time, health, and happiness. With our support, balancing work and life has never been easier. Ready to work your way? Join our team and experience the difference!
 Shape Your Work Experience
At Keeneo, your comfort and flexibility come first. You decide where and how you work best—whether in one of our global offices, a coworking space, from the comfort of your home, or a combination of both. Embrace the freedom to create a work style that suits your needs, blending in-office collaboration with remote independence in any ratio you choose. Purpose-built work areas, a cozy home setup, or the perfect balance—it’s all about giving you the tools to succeed your way.

As an internationally connected company, we combine expertise across borders with a local presence. With headquarters in Paris, sales offices in Lyon, Madrid, Düsseldorf, and Texas, and working hubs spanning South America, North Africa, and Central Asia, we operate on a truly worldwide scale.

Title: Senior Backend Engineer - AGI (Python)
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Top Salary, Awesome Benefits
Premium healthcare for 3 members in family
