Skills and Experience:
Job description
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Senior Developer to join our growing team, responsible for building and maintaining our calling platform. This platform is a mission-critical service that manages the routing of phone calls, schedules, and relays messages, and handles payment processing, making debt recovery more efficient.
As a Senior Developer, you will play a vital role in designing, developing, deploying, and maintaining high-quality, scalable, and resilient systems. You will collaborate with a team of talented engineers to build and improve upon our existing microservices architecture, driving innovation and efficiency within our platform. Our current stack is heavily Python-based, utilizing frameworks like FastAPI and tools such as SQLAlchemy, Redis, Celery, and more. We are committed to expanding our technological horizons and are planning to incorporate more languages, particularly Golang, into our ecosystem to leverage its strengths in performance and concurrency, aligning with the practices of other teams within the company. In addition to backend services, we are also seeking engineers who can contribute to building dynamic and responsive user interfaces using modern front-end techniques.

Your skills and experience
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent experience.
5+ years of professional experience in software development, with a proven track record of building and deploying production-ready applications.
Strong proficiency in either Python, Golang, Node.js or C# and their associated ecosystem.
Willingness to move to another if required. 
Experience with relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL) and NoSQL databases (e.g., Redis).
Solid understanding of software engineering principles, design patterns, and best practices.
Experience building and consuming RESTful APIs.
Familiarity with containerization (Docker) and orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes).
Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git).
Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and communication skills.
Domain Expertise (You’re likely to be using one or more of these concepts described here for your day-to-day)
Experience in writing detailed technical specification and documentation. 
Proven experience in optimizing database performance, including query optimization, indexing strategies, and schema design.
Experience with database profiling tools and techniques to identify and resolve database bottlenecks
Strong SQL skills, particularly with PostgreSQL (or similar).
Experience with domain driven design and test driven development
Familiarity with UDP, websockets, VoIP protocols (SIP, RTP, WebRTC) and their underlying mechanisms.
Familiarity with telephony signaling and media processing.
Familiarity with codecs, cloud telephony platforms, routing and their impact on call quality.
Familiarity with call routing, IVR systems, and call queuing.
Familiarity with concepts such as consistent hashing, lock free data structures and orchestration

Why you'll love working here

Title: Remote Sr. Automation QA Engineer (Appium/Selenium)
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Work from home from Vietnam
Excellent Team Culture
Rapid Growth Business
Skills and Experience:
Job description
As a Senior QA Automation Engineer, you will play a critical role in our quality assurance strategy. You will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining end-to-end automation frameworks, primarily using JavaScript and Playwright, to ensure our applications meet the highest standards.
You will also participate in manual testing for edge cases and new features where automation coverage is not yet established, particularly during tight deadlines or release-critical periods. This position requires a deep understanding of testing principles, strong programming skills, solid experience with CI/CD and API testing, and the ability to communicate fluently in English with international teams and clients.
 Key Responsibilities
 Test Automation Development
– Design and implement reusable and scalable test automation frameworks using JavaScript and Playwright for web applications.
– Continuously refactor and improve test code for maintainability and performance.
– Ensure automation scripts are modular, robust, and aligned with development best practices.
– Integrate automated test cases into CI/CD pipelines and configure auto-execution based on branch activities.
Manual Testing Support
– Actively participate in manual testing where automation is not yet available or is not suitable (e.g., exploratory, UI/UX validation, pre-release smoke tests).
– Provide clear and reproducible steps when reporting bugs.
– Validate bug fixes through both automated and manual testing as required.
– Collaborate with product owners and UI/UX designers to understand features before writing manual or automated tests.
API Testing
– Design and execute API test cases using tools like Postman, Newman, or REST Assured.
– Validate API responses, performance, and data integrity across services.
– Automate API test suites and ensure they are integrated into CI pipelines.
CI/CD Integration
– Maintain and optimize CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Azure DevOps) to automatically run tests during build/deployment phases.
– Work with DevOps engineers to implement environment-specific test triggers and health checks.
– Report flaky tests and ensure pipeline stability through root cause analysis and fixes.
Collaboration & Mentoring
– Work closely with developers, QA engineers, DevOps, and product managers in Agile teams.
– Participate in requirement analysis, planning meetings, and sprint reviews to align testing efforts.
– Mentor junior QA engineers and help elevate team capabilities.
– Review test code contributions from team members to maintain code quality standards.

Your skills and experience
Required Skills & Qualifications
Minimum 5 years of experience in software QA with a strong focus on test automation., Appium or Selenium
Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with JavaScript and Playwright.
Proven experience creating automation frameworks from scratch for scalable, data-driven testing.
Proficient in using Git and managing source code in a collaborative environment.
Strong experience with CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab, or Azure DevOps.
Hands-on experience with API testing tools such as Postman, REST Assured, Newman, etc.
Experience with debugging tools (e.g., Chrome DevTools), browser console logs, and network analysis.
Familiarity with cross-browser testing, responsive testing, and headless browser testing.
Fluent English communication (both written and verbal) is mandatory
Preferred Qualifications
Ownership mindset – proactive in identifying issues and pushing for resolution.
Willingness to support manual testing when needed, especially in critical testing phases.
Strong analytical thinking and ability to troubleshoot complex problems.
Excellent teamwork and mentorship skills.
Willing to learn quickly and adapt to new tools, technologies, or frameworks.

Why you'll love working here
Working with us:
- Working time: 9am - 6pm (Vietnam Time)
- 12 days of annual leaves
- Extra pay for Overtime
 Perks:
- Work from home: our entire company has worked virtually since inception. We have well-developed systems and processes to support remote work.
- Rapid Growth Business: our company is growing rapidly and there is opportunity to grow with our team.
- Excellent Team Culture and a positive, supportive environment. Relaxed, friendly vibe with a regional HQ.
- Engagement Events: Company Trips, Team building, Year End Party, Gift for special occasions and Monthly team meeting allowances.
- Equipment Support Allowance after probation

Title: Senior Product Owner - Digital ID & Payments
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Top Salary, Awesome Benefits
Premium healthcare for 3 members in family

Skills and Experience:
Job description
Trusting Social is the leading Digital Identity & Payment Authentication service provider for the Banking & Financial sector in Vietnam, Indonesia, Philippines, and India, boasting over 30 existing clients, including banks, financial companies, and e-wallets. Our TrustVision solutions empower clients to onboard customers digitally anytime and anywhere, detect fraud, and enable secure transactions using advanced facial recognition and AI models.
 How you will make an impact in this role
As a Product Owner in the Digital Identity & Payment Authentication Product at Trusting Social, you will participate in decision-making and prioritization to drive product strategy, roadmap, and development, addressing identity trust in the financial sector in Vietnam and other Trusting Social markets. You will have the ultimate responsibility for implementing product features that deliver world-class Digital Identity/eKYC. Your role will involve delivering next-generation Digital Identity & Payment Authentication product offerings to our clients and playing a key role in ideating and co-creating new features tailored to Trusting Social's clients and market needs. 
If you're genuinely passionate about building world-class Digital Identity & Payment Authentication products and never settling for second place, join us on a journey of discovery to solve problems and deliver excellence.
 Responsibilities
Understand market needs and customers' pain points, stay updated on market trends, participate in creating a compelling product vision, and develop a product roadmap quarterly and annually.
Obsess over customers to deliver the products they need, constantly study the products to understand every aspect and fine-tune them to meet customer needs.
Proactively engage in the end-to-end product cycle of research, development, testing, deployment, and improvement.
Engage with clients and users to gather constant feedback and incorporate it into the product features.
Use data to understand product and feature performance, and suggest data-driven initiatives to improve the product and user experience. 
Collaborate closely with Data Scientists and Product Managers to build a data-informed product roadmap. 
Use data and client feedback to identify new fraud schemes. Advise clients with tailored use cases based on data and testing outcomes. 
Provide expert opinions for enhancements/improvements of the product suite provided to clients.
Collaborate with Data Scientists and Engineers to ensure smooth and proper production implementation. 
Manage data collection for product performance tracking and improvement. 
Support sales in pitching and deployment for customers.

Your skills and experience
Minimum 
5+ years of experience in product management 
Experience in SaaS/B2B product development
Technical background with a degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field 
Ability to collect and analyze data from various sources, identify key insights, spot product opportunities, and inform product decisions 
Willingness to roll up your sleeves and do whatever it takes to help your team win 
Ability to maintain a keen attention to detail, multitask, and work well under pressure 
Good interpersonal skills 
Teamwork and hardworking with enthusiastic attitudes 
Strong learning ability and self-motivation to acquire new knowledge 
Capability to zoom in and out on a problem 
Effective problem-solving skills under pressure
Preferred  
Proven track record in Product Management 
Experience with Banking & Financial B2B products, especially payment/ credit transfer solutions.
Familiarity with common data analysis toolkits, such as SQL 
Knowledge of AI/Machine Learning topics 
Experience in managing KYC process or fraud risk management for customer onboarding
An MBA degree would be a plus.
Excellent candidates
Passionate about solving complex and large-scale/world-class problems, finding joy in crafting solutions that impact millions of lives or transform the world.
Excellent in problem-solving, solving problems in a well-structured, data-backed, and deeply analytical manner, combined with a touch of creativity.
Strong track records of products attest to their effectiveness in creating meaningful impacts and addressing the intended challenges.
Extreme ownership is without a doubt, working for the love of it, leading the team to help millions of lives.

WHO WE ARE
Founded in 2014, GEEK Up is the home of passionate Geeks, who share the same passion for building disruptive digital products that win Hearts, Minds and Markets. With expertise in all aspects of Product Development, during our 10 years journey, we have built and launched impactful digital products for enterprises and startups around the world.
 WHAT ARE WE PROUD OF
GEEK Up is a strategic digital product partner of 100+ brands in Southeast Asia as TPBank, Heineken, Saint-Gobain, Waitrr, Funding Societies, Karzo, etc. Agile is our DNA. It is about how we think, how we approach problems, how we regularly retrospect our work, how we being transparent and communicate with every member in our teams. Every product and design decision from GEEK Up is based on empathy towards user experience in order to bring them the highest values. 
More about us:
GEEK Up business:
GEEK Up environment:

SCOPE OF WORK
Your responsibilities will focus on defining key criteria to validate product assumptions, ensuring alignment across teams, and assessing whether products meet defined completion standards at all product development stages:
Interpret and classify various types of requirements (FR, NFR, Operations Req., User Req,...), ensuring a structured approach to product definition that goes beyond happy paths to enhance product robustness.
Ensure the product operates smoothly in three key dimensions (User-Operation-Technical) by various software testing activities (test planning, estimating, test script creation, defect creation/resolution, integration testing, regression testing,...)
Oversee end-to-end product quality to meet predefined assumptions by: 
- Ensure that users, business logic and operational workflows are seamlessly implemented.
- Validate technical integrations to ensure smooth system interactions without functional gaps 
- Identify edge cases to ensure comprehensive coverage of user interactions and system constraints.

Your skills and experience

Good communication skill to work in cross-functionally squads to ensure product alignment and execution
Nice to have
Product mindset to navigate unclear product's requirements, high level concept and refine problem statements that align on business and user needs.

Why you'll love working here

There are team members sharing lessons learned, so each and everyone can keep building up knowledge and experience
FOR YOUR BETTER GROW

There are weekly workshops and sharings, where we exchange our knowledge and experience, from technical to soft skills, from work to daily life subjects
We embrace the eagerness of learning and sharing, so you will always have room to raise your own voice
FOR YOUR BETTER STAY

Làm việc với các nhóm phần cứng để tối ưu hóa các mô hình AI cho các thiết bị nhúng, đảm bảo hiệu suất và tiêu thụ điện năng tối ưu trên các nền tảng như GPU của Jetson hoặc DSP/AI của Qualcomm.
Lãnh đạo và hỗ trợ các kỹ sư junior, cung cấp hỗ trợ kỹ thuật, giúp đội ngũ cải thiện kỹ năng và phát triển các mô hình AI hiệu quả.
Đảm bảo chất lượng mô hình AI và kết quả đầu ra, bao gồm việc kiểm tra, đánh giá, và cải thiện độ chính xác của các mô hình trong các ứng dụng thực tế.

Title: Senior iOS Engineer
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
A very clear, global mission
A product already in use across in 190+ countries
Hybrid work, 25 days holiday + 6 weeks remote!
Skills and Experience:
Job description
Our mission is to become the global standard for addressing. Street addresses weren’t designed for 2025. They aren’t accurate enough to specify building entrances, and they don’t exist for parks, rural areas and many parts of the world. This makes it hard to find places and causes problems and inefficiencies on a global scale.

That’s why we created what3words. We divided the world into 3m squares and gave each square a unique combination of three words. It’s the easiest way to find and share precise locations.

Over the last year, what3words has been used in 193 countries, and our monthly active users continue to grow at an impressive pace. Our tech is used by emergency services, delivery companies, eCommerce businesses, ride-hailing apps and NGOs, and is integrated into the navigation systems of millions of cars around the world.

Role:

The role is for a Senior  iOS developer to work on our core app used by millions.  We’re scaling a our existing engineering, product and sales team in Ho Chi Minh City so it’s a very exciting time to join if you want to have impact. You’ll be designing, building and scaling our mobile apps and working with engineers and product specialists in London. You’ll be working to deliver our product roadmap, choosing technologies and delivering features.  The job will be working closely with the QA, UX and product teams as well, helping to iteratively develop new features  and will be based out of Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

You:

You should have experience working in a startup environment or high impact environment, delivering apps on iOS, watchOS and others, working with a range of technologies, be able to pick up new skills quickly.

Responsibilities:
  Build and maintain features on our core app
Collaborate with our other mobile and front end engineers to make a consolidated portfolio of products
Deliver features end to end from inception and design through implementation and deployment and testing
Stay up to date on the latest technologies and trends in iOS development

Your skills and experience
Essential Skills:
  5+ years Swift development in XCode 
Familiar with common iOS frameworks (e.g. UIKit, SwiftUI, Combine, Foundation, MapKit, Core Location, Core Animation)
Extensive end-to-end experience developing mobile apps, from interpreting UX designs to working with product teams on recursive feedback and analytics/testing
Experience building and distributing components for third parties
Experience with Git, and GitHub
Distributing software via Swift Package Manager, CocoaPods, Carthage
Unit testing/UI testing with XCTest (SonarCloud a plus)

Title: QA Engineer
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
A very clear, global mission
A product already in use across in 190+ countries
Hybrid work, 25 days holiday + 6 weeks remote!
Skills and Experience:
Job description
Street addresses weren’t designed for 2025. They aren’t accurate enough to specify building entrances, and they don’t exist for parks, rural areas and many parts of the world. This makes it hard to find places and causes problems and inefficiencies on a global scale.

That’s why we created what3words. We divided the world into 3m squares and gave each square a unique combination of three words. It’s the easiest way to find and share precise locations.

Over the last year, what3words has been used in 193 countries, and our monthly active users continue to grow at an impressive pace. Our tech is used by emergency services, delivery companies, eCommerce businesses, ride-hailing apps and NGOs, and is integrated into the navigation systems of millions of cars around the world.

Who we’re looking for

We’re looking for a QA Engineer to join our engineering team in Ho Chi Minh City to work closely with our engineering and product teams and who will be responsible for testing what3words products and tools in our product ecosystem focusing particularly on Mobile and web apps, associated wearable tech and integrations with our automotive partners. We need someone who can adapt quickly to new projects and work across our products to explore and find issues others wouldn’t.  

At what3words, we're proud of our tech stack. We have built a massively scalable, microservices-based architecture, based around Kubernetes on AWS. The wider engineering team works with technologies such as ReactJS, Docker, Redis, AWS Lambdas, Prometheus, Grafana, Python, Athena, BigQuery, Java, Scala, C++, and Swift.

This is a great opportunity to join a collaborative, ambitious and Agile team, at one of the most exciting times in this company's life.

Examples of tasks you will work on include:
  Writing test cases for new products and features.
Updating our automated tests to add coverage.
Reviewing and refining requirements with product owners and engineers.
Perform go live testing on release of new features.
Find and isolate bugs and determine their impact on the product or release.
Help troubleshoot issues.
Signing off on new releases.

Your skills and experience
Requirements:
  Experience of testing iOS and Android apps
Experience with bug tracking tools like Jira
Knowledge of exploratory testing and how to find new ways to break things
Exceptional attention to detail 
Ability to write and run tests in cypress
Experience using Git
 Bonus points for:
  Knowledge of Google Maps or Leaflet, GIS systems, AWS, Kubernetes, Hubspot or similar CRM systems
Experience of Agile working environments.
Experience working with wearables in iOS and Android
Experience working with automotive technologies
Experience of accessibility testing with screen readers 
API Testing: knowledge of APIs and API automation

The role is based in our centrally located HCMC office. While you can work from the office five days a week if preferred, our Engineering team can choose to work up to two days a week from home. We also offer a six-week remote-work allowance; for up to six weeks a year, you can work from anywhere in the world (as long as you’ve got great WiFi and are happy to work with your main office timezone).
 Equality, diversity and inclusion at what3words
 Our mission is to help everyone talk about everywhere, and we believe diverse perspectives make for a better company and better products too. Title: IT Manager
Skills and Experience:
Job description
Phát triển các dịch vụ hạ tầng cơ sở CNTT để tăng thêm năng suất hiệu quả cho các hoạt động kinh doanh, xử lý tác nghiệp và thu thập thông tin trong phạm vi toàn công ty.
Đảm bảo hệ thống CNTT vận hành thông suốt, chính xác, an toàn - bảo mật, và sẵn sàng cho các hoạt động của tất cả các bộ phận / đơn vị của công ty.
Phát triển và thực hiện các chính sách, thủ tục quản lý hệ thống thông tin, và hạ tầng cơ sở để hỗ trợ tốt nhất cho các mục tiêu kinh doanh chung của công ty.
Quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu: Thực hiện các biện pháp đảm bảo tính chất toàn vẹn, an ninh và sẵn sàng của cơ sở dữ liệu toàn Cty bao gồm việc cập nhật cơ sở dữ liệu hiện có và xây dựng hệ thống cơ sở dữ liệu mới cho các ứng dụng.
Tham mưu cho Ban Giám đốc về công tác xây dựng các kế hoạch phát triển CNTT phù hợp với chiến lược, quy hoạch, kế hoạch của công ty và tổ chức triển khai thực hiện sau khi được phê duyệt...
Chịu trách nhiệm quản trị các dự án về CNTT, liên quan quan đến việc đáp ứng được các yêu cầu hoạt động và phát triển của công ty, trong thời hạn chấp nhận được của các thông số về chi phí, thời gian và chất lượng (bao gồm cả nhà cung cấp / đối tác lựa chọn, quy hoạch, lập dự án theo dõi và kiểm soát ngân sách).
Chịu trách nhiệm cung cấp hệ thông xử lý đa tác vụ cho tất cả các người sử dụng, phần cứng và phần mềm (công cụ), bao gồm cài đặt, cấu hình, bảo trì và hỗ trợ các hệ thống này. Xác định các lựa chọn thay thế để tối ưu hóa các nguồn tài nguyên CNTT.
Chịu trách nhiệm trong quản lý, thiết lập, theo dõi và bảo trì hạ tầng cơ sở CNTT và hệ thống viễn thông. Giám sát và hố trợ chuyên môn trong xử lý tất cả sự cố (bên trong và bên ngoài hệ thống).
Quản lý việc mua hàng hóa dịch vụ CNTT, chi phí sử dụng và thực hành các phương án tiết kiệm cũng như đánh giá nhà cung cấp hàng hóa, dịch vụ. Chịu trách nhiệm quản lý tài sản CNTT và cung cấp tất cả các phần mềm, phần cứng, vật tư - trang thiết bị cho hệ thống CNTT của Cty.
Đánh giá mức độ phù hợp của hạ tầng cơ sở CNTT cần thiết để hỗ trợ các mục tiêu kinh doanh (ví dụ như Firewall và Active Directory, MetroNet hoặc VPN cho các ứng dụng). Thường xuyên xác định hiệu quả hoạt động (cũng như tiết kiệm chi phí) trong các ứng dụng CNTT tập trung.
Phối hợp các thủ tục kiểm soát nội bộ và các chính sách khác tại cty để đảm bảo rủi ro được xác định, đánh giá và quản lý thông qua việc xem xét định kỳ hệ thống CNTT hàng tháng/ năm.
Hỗ trợ tư vấn, đào tạo (định kỳ hay khi có yêu cầu), huấn luyện nhân viên (trong phòng CNTT và các bộ phận / đơn vị) phù hợp với nhu phát triển của công ty và khả năng của nhân viên.

Your skills and experience
Giới tính: Nam
Trình độ học vấn: tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên, Chuyên ngành IT/Kỹ sư/Mạng máy tính hoặc các ngành tương đương
Kinh nghiệm 5 năm ở vị trí tương đương
Có khả năng tốt về xây dựng và phát triển hệ thống hạ tầng cơ sở.
Hiểu biết tốt về các ứng dụng doanh nghiệp hỗ trợ bán hàng, quản lý giáo dục,...
Hiểu biết tốt về phát triển các hệ thống ứng dụng (CRM/Office 365) và cơ sở dữ liệu.
Có khả năng tổng hợp, phân tích và xử lý vấn đề nhanh.

Why you'll love working here
Ứng viên trúng tuyển sẽ được hưởng mức thu nhập cạnh tranh

Title: Jr DevOps Engineer (Python, Cloud)

We are seeking a highly skilled DevOps Engineer to join our team. The successful candidate will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining our cloud infrastructure and deployment pipelines. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background and the ability to work in a fast-paced environment.
• Design and deploy infrastructure systems for AI products in on-premise/private cloud customer environments.
• Manage and monitor AWS-based environments to ensure high availability, scalability, and security of SaaS applications.

• Design and implement infrastructure and automation tools that support continuous delivery and deployment processes.

• Lead innovation efforts in evaluating new frameworks, libraries, and technologies.
• Troubleshoot and resolve infrastructure-related issues, providing support to development and operations teams.

Your skills and experience
• 2 years+ of experience in DevOps or infrastructure management roles, with experience in a banking or financial institution environment preferred.

• Experience working in a DevOps role supporting production software in a 24/7 environment.

• Experience with AI and Machine Learning concepts and tools.

Why you'll love working here

Title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer
Skills and Experience:
Job description
As a Senior Site Reliability Engineer, you will play a critical role in architecting and maintaining the infrastructure that powers our AI-driven SaaS and private cloud offerings. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement best-in-class reliability practices, optimize system performance, and ensure seamless operations for our enterprise clients.
Key Responsibilities
Design and Build Infrastructure: Architect and implement scalable, secure, and highly available cloud infrastructure to support our SaaS and private cloud platforms.
System Reliability: Develop and maintain systems to ensure 99.99% uptime, including monitoring, alerting, and incident response strategies.
Automation: Drive automation of infrastructure provisioning, configuration management, and deployment pipelines to improve efficiency and reduce human error.
Performance Optimization: Identify and resolve performance bottlenecks in distributed systems, ensuring low-latency and high-throughput operations.
Security and Compliance: Implement security best practices and ensure compliance with industry standards (e.g., SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA) for our private cloud deployments.
Incident Management: Lead incident response, root cause analysis, and post-mortem processes to prevent recurrence and improve system resilience.
Collaboration: Work closely with software engineering, data science, and product teams to align infrastructure capabilities with business needs.
Capacity Planning: Forecast resource requirements and plan for scalable growth to meet increasing customer demand.
Documentation: Maintain clear and comprehensive documentation of infrastructure designs, processes, and operational procedures.

Your skills and experience
Experience: 5+ years of experience in site reliability engineering, DevOps, or a related field, with a focus on cloud-based systems.
Technical Skills:
Expertise in cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP) and infrastructure-as-code tools (e.g., Terraform, Ansible, CloudFormation).
Proficiency in containerization and orchestration (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes).
Strong scripting and programming skills (e.g., Python, Go, Bash).
Experience with CI/CD pipelines and tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI, ArgoCD).
Knowledge of monitoring and observability tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, ELK stack).
Knowledge of OSI model
Familiarity with networking, security, and database systems (e.g., SQL, NoSQL).
Problem-Solving: Proven ability to troubleshoot complex, distributed systems and resolve issues under pressure.
Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience).
Nice-to-Have:
Experience in AI/ML infrastructure or high-performance computing.
Certifications in cloud platforms or SRE-related disciplines (e.g., AWS Certified DevOps Engineer, Google SRE).
Familiarity with private cloud deployments and hybrid infrastructure.

Why you'll love working here
Impactful Work:
Be a key contributor to a fast-growing AI company transforming the B2B SaaS landscape.
Take part in high-impact projects with opportunities to quickly develop your skills, lead teams, and grow your career globally.
Your contributions are recognized with both professional advancement and strong financial rewards.
Collaborative Culture:
Join a passionate, innovative, and young team that values diversity, creativity, and open communication.
Experience a dynamic, democratic work environment with regular team building, sports events, and company trips that strengthen bonds and make work more enjoyable.
Competitive Compensation:
Enjoy an attractive, negotiable salary based on your experience and capabilities, along with equity options.
Benefit from a comprehensive package including social, health, and unemployment insurance, aligned with FPT Corporation’s standards.
Professional Growth:
Access continuous learning opportunities, including AWS training and certification programs.
You’ll be encouraged to take initiative, gain leadership experience, and explore international career development pathways.
Flexible Work: 
Work from anywhere with a remote-friendly policy and flexible hours designed to support your productivity and work-life balance.

Title: Full-stack Developer (ReactJS/NodeJS/Golang) - Hybrid
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
At Silentium, we value attitude the most
Attractive salary with Premium Healthcare plan
Great team & project, Big bonus
Skills and Experience:
Job description
Silentium is a software consulting company focusing on building products for our partners, mainly in Europe. To fuel the growth, we are looking for energetic Developers to share the journey of learning and growing. 
 Our Technical Stack
We use Next.js for the front end. On the backend, we are in the process of integrating GraphQL and Prisma to enhance the capabilities of Next.js. Currently, a significant portion of the backend is implemented in Golang and Java.
The application is divided into multiple microservices, deployed on a Kubernetes infrastructure. For databases, we use both PostgreSQL and MongoDB. This setup provides a dynamic environment with plenty of opportunities to learn and grow as an engineer. 
 Responsibilities 
Participate in all phases of the development life cycle under guidance from senior team members.
Optimize the system for reliability and performance
Write high-quality, clean, elegant, and maintainable code
Work closely with the Product Manager, Product Designer, and other developers to deliver the product
Resolve challenging technical issues: Handle straightforward technical challenges, escalating complex issues to senior developers.
Design solutions to provide what the service needs
Build, test, deploy, and improve the quality of the software under supervision.
Contribute to improving the toolset and development experience

Your skills and experience
Having strong technical skills, we do expect any team members to be very strong in JavaScript and TypeScript. You'll be working with JavaScript on both Frontend and Backend.
Have strong architecture skills, stand on your own, and make and protect your own architecture decisions.
Have an open mind, can-but-not-blindly-do attitude. You have a "can-do" attitude, which is already very cool, but you also must be able to pause and ask "Should we do it"
Understand the value of writing test
Professional and be a TEAM PLAYER, because we can move nowhere without a team.
A plus if you contribute frequently to open-source projects (please give us a reference link if applicable)
A plus if you have talked to the conference (please give us a reference link if applicable)
Requirement
Strong experience in developing both frontend and backend
Extensive experience working with JavaScript and TypeScript
Experience working with databases like MongoDB, PostgreSQL
Experienced in architecting and designing software
Experience with writing Unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end test
Big plus if you have experience in Automation Testing frameworks, e.g. Playwright
From 1.5**+ years of relevant experience**
We work with Golang structure, as such, you'll be requested to know how to work with the Golang codebase
Big plus if you have experience in Golang
Interview Process
You'll be given the 1st face to face interview with the corresponding team/ or Team leader where we'll talk about technical skills and experience. The interview will take approximately 2 hours and will include a live coding assignment.
After that, there'll be peer to peer interview where you'll have a chance to know more about your teammates (Product Manager, Designer, and other developers) , and learn more about the team dynamics.
You’ll receive the final result within 3 working days.

Why you'll love working here
Hybrid working Model 
A lot of ownership of your work. We tackle challenges, as a team
Chance to design a complex system and see that comes live
Very open environment, with no hierarchy, we want you to be the change you seek
Competitive salary. We pay what you deserve, not what the paper says
Full compulsory Social, Health, and Unemployment insurance.
Sponsored Grab support to work at a beautiful office in D2 with unlimited free coffee, tea, snacks, and fruit to keep you energized. 
High-tech gear to support your work: Apple/Windows laptops, an extra monitor, etc.
Up to 13 days of annual leave with a loyalty program. Get 1 day more extra AL after 1st 2 years, and get 1 day more /year from the next year. 
Additional 03 days off: Christmas leave (25/12), Vietnamese Family Day (28/6), Birthday leave
Gifts on special days like birthdays, Tet, and Holidays
Premium Health Insurance for yourself and family members  
Loyalty Program Cash & Annual Leave - up to 1000 USD  
13th-month bonus salary
Yearly Company Trip; Monthly/Quarterly team-building activities and special celebrations on Autumn Festival, Halloween, Christmas, Tet, …
Big chance to grow as a person. We use Eventstorming, Service Blueprint, Empathy map, and a lot of modern toolsets to make our life easier, and we are eager to share that with you
Even bigger chance to grow as an engineer. We're all open to trying and applying new technology; if it doesn't work, well, we have learned

Job description
About Kinex
We’re building the next generation of human-AI experiences—intelligent agents, dynamic AI-driven products, and virtual worlds where users don’t just interact with tech, they connect with it.
At Kinex, we value ownership, realness, and bias for action. We're a team that learns fast, builds faster, and always asks: "Why not?"
 The Role
We’re looking for a passionate and hands-on AI Fullstack Engineer to help us build AI-native applications from the ground up. This is not your typical CRUD job. You’ll be designing how users interact with AI—through natural language, multi-modal interfaces, and intelligent agents. You’ll touch everything from prompt engineering and LLM orchestration to fine-tuning models and deploying real-time user interfaces.
You’ll work at the intersection of product, UX, and machine learning to ship features that feel like magic—but are powered by solid engineering.

 Responsibilities
Design and implement AI-powered features end-to-end—from model to frontend
Integrate and orchestrate LLMs (OpenAI, Claude, custom) via LangChain, Semantic Kernel, or similar tools
Build conversational agents and tools using prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, vector databases
Deploy models using Hugging Face, Replicate, or fine-tune small/medium-size models when needed
Own fullstack delivery of features using React.js, Node.js, Supabase, or similar stacks
Continuously test, evaluate, and optimize AI interactions for reliability, speed, and user delight
Stay on top of bleeding-edge AI tools and research, and propose how we can apply them
Collaborate with PMs, designers, and users to shape intelligent UX/UI
Champion security, privacy, and ethical use of AI in our product

You Are...
An AI builder at heart—you think in prompts, embeddings, and latency
A fast mover with a “ship > perfect” mindset
Obsessed with building things that feel human and useful
Not afraid of ambiguity—you shape the path as you walk it
Hungry to learn, improve, and grow—every day
Collaborative, humble, and always down to help your teammates win

Your skills and experience

Job description
Note: This position is hiring in both Hanoi and HCMC. 
 ABOUT MONEY FORWARD:  
With the mission of 'Pushing Business Forward. Pushing People Forward,' Money Forward offers a wide range of services and products, including personal household accounting and asset management services, back-office SaaS services for corporations, and Fintech promotion services for financial institutions, catering to both B2C and B2B markets.
The Money Forward Business Company (MFBC), which we are currently recruiting for, operates the corporate back-office SaaS service 'Money Forward Cloud,' which accounts for more than 60% of the Money Forward Group's revenue. This service integrates various back-office data, automates tasks, and streamlines cumbersome accounting and HR operations.
'Money Forward Cloud,' which offers more than 30 services, is strengthening its platform engineering team to create an environment where service developers can focus on delivering more value to users. By centrally managing the complexity of combined experiences and data integration, we aim to reduce the cognitive load on service developers and improve the overall product quality across the company.
ABOUT THE TEAM: 
We are responsible for designing and standardizing the architecture for the entire MFBC, creating templates and sharing knowledge applicable to each service to enhance the overall technical capabilities of MFBC. 
This will facilitate efficient technology selection and architecture reviews, addressing organizational bottlenecks. 
Additionally, we develop guidelines and methods for managing technical debt and re-architecting, and define the scope of security design within the architecture, applying it company-wide as needed. 
Furthermore, we closely collaborate with Product Managers (PdM) and developers to incorporate architectural insights into the development process, aiming to improve productivity and quality.
When necessary, we temporarily join teams to support the implementation of new architectures and the repayment of technical debt. This enables each product to confidently design the architecture necessary for its unique needs. Additionally, demonstrating technical influence both within and outside the company and serving as a role model is an important part of the role.
YOUR RESPONSIBILITY: 
Design and standardize the architecture for the entire MFBC.
Create templates and share knowledge applicable to each service.
Conduct technology selection and architecture reviews, addressing bottlenecks.
Develop guidelines and methods for managing technical debt and re-architecting.
Define and apply the scope of security design within the architecture company-wide.
Collaborate with PdM and developers to integrate architectural insights into the development process.
Temporarily join teams as needed to support implementation and technical debt repayment.
Demonstrate technical influence and establish a role model within and outside the company.

Knowledge and experience in security design.

Experience in managing and resolving technical debt.

Tổ chức triển khai thực hiện, kiểm soát quá trình & thực hiện nhiệm vụ quản lý chức năng ngành dọc xuyên suốt toàn hệ thống.
Thiết lập cơ cấu thông tin dữ liệu và cung cấp các giải pháp tổng thể trong quản lý các nguồn lực, chương trình và quản trị dự án, xây dựng phát triển các tiêu chuẩn chung.
Theo dõi và đánh giá, nghiên cứu phân tích tìm kiếm các giải pháp CNTT và phát triển ứng dụng thích hợp.
Thực hiện và tư vấn thực hiện công tác an ninh bảo mật trong hệ thống máy tính, kiểm tra phòng ngừa các sự cố chủ quan hoặc khách quan, các lỗ hổng bảo mật, tìm mọi biện pháp để hoạt động của hệ thống mạng máy tính không bị trục trặc, hư hỏng.
Nghiên cứu, phân tích nhận dạng các yêu cầu và các đơn đặt hàng từ Ban lãnh đạo Công ty, các phòng chức năng, đơn vị trong việc ứng dụng các giải pháp phần mềm và quản trị hành chính hiệu quả, chuyên nghiệp.
Kiểm soát việc trao đổi thông tin thông qua hệ thống mạng
Xây dựng các mục tiêu và kế hoạch hành động của phòng.
Quản lý chỉ đạo, chịu trách nhiệm chung mọi mặt hoạt động của phòng. 
Phân công điều phối nguồn lực đáp ứng yêu cầu nhiệm vụ được giao.
Hoàn thiện các quy trình mẫu: Tổ chức xây dựng và hoàn thiện tất cả các loại văn bản, biểu mẫu, qui định, qui trình, thủ tục, … trong hoạt động tác nghiệp của phòng.
Thiết lập các mục tiêu công việc, phân công, giao việc, hướng dẫn, giám sát việc thực hiện của CBNV trong phạm vi quản lý.
Các công việc khác theo sự phân công của Ban lãnh đạo

Your skills and experience

Tốt nghiệp Đại Học trở lên Chuyên Ngành Công Nghệ Thông Tin, Mạng hoặc các ngành liên quan 
2. Kinh nghiệm làm việc
Tối thiểu 05 năm kinh nghiệm quản trị và vận hành website thương mại điện tử hoặc các vị trí tương đương.
Có kiến thức và kinh nghiệm thực tế về quản trị server, công nghệ bảo mật.
Am hiểu sâu về các hệ quản trị nội dung (CMS) như WordPress, Joomla hoặc các hệ thống tương tự.
Thành thạo các ngôn ngữ lập trình: HTML, CSS, PHP, ASP.NET, MVC, C#, JavaScript, MySQL, SQL Server, và các framework như .NET Framework.
Am hiểu về kỹ thuật và kinh nghiệm thực tế về Networking (Lan, Wan)
Hiểu biết về phần cứng máy chủ, máy trạm, thiết bị mạng
3. Kỹ năng / Skill: 
Quản trị và tối ưu hóa hệ thống cơ sở dữ liệu (MySQL, SQL Server, …).
Hiểu biết về bảo mật ứng dụng Web, đảm bảo an toàn dữ liệu và hệ thống.
Am hiểu về SEO, Google Analytics, và Google Search Console, giúp tối ưu hiệu suất và tăng cường sự hiện diện trực tuyến.
Tư duy hệ thống, kỹ năng phân tích và giải quyết vấn đề một cách hiệu quả.
Có khả năng viết tài liệu dự án, hệ thống hóa quy trình.
Tổng hợp và phân tích báo cáo. Thi hành nhiệm vụ chính xác, đúng quy định.
Tự tổ chức, sắp xếp và xây dựng kế hoạch để thực hiện nhiệm vụ được phân công.
Sử dụng tiếng anh giao tiếp tốt.

Mức lương cạnh tranh theo năng lực, lương tháng 13…
Được tham gia đầy đủ chế độ bảo hiểm theo quy định của nhà nước.

Job description
At Neyu, we are building an ecosystem and platforms that empower businesses and individuals to  share their values through their products and services with billions of people worldwide. We believe that serving others is the key to unlocking happiness, health, and more meaningful lives. As a rapidly expanding MarTech company, we operate across Asia, including Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, the Philippines, and Indonesia, and are extending our reach into other countries in Asia and Latin America.

We are dedicated to listening to your needs and delivering on your expectations. Our group is also a top-ranked direct sales company in Southeast Asia, boasting a global team of over 1400 people and a strong presence in Vietnam, Indonesia, Thailand, Malaysia, and the Philippines. 
 Leveraging our e-commerce platform channels, we create and sell healthcare and pharmaceutical products, particularly within the Nutra niche. With a successful combination of fundamental marketing principles and advanced IT technologies, the opportunities are vast, and the limits are nonexistent. Monitoring daily operations, including server hardware, software and operating systems.

Solving complex and diverse problems by continually re-evaluating new and/or conflicting factors. 
Managing internal and external communications and being the primary contact of escalation for business issues. 
Assisting with the management of relationships with external organizations and suppliers. 
Embodying our company values, which are: be reliable, be caring, be transparent and be willing

University graduate in Telecommunications, IT or related majors

Proven knowledge and experience of delivering technical support services.

Experience with implementing and maintaining effective data protection services, including security, backups and disaster recovery. 
Experience with hybrid environments including on-premises and cloud services. 
Good attention to detail, improving process efficiency without sacrificing quality. 
Effective people management skills. 
Ability to collaboratively solve complex problems. 
Ability to work under pressure and managing conflicting priorities. 
Facilitation and project management skills. 
Able to work independently or team work, research new technologies 
Strong communication skills and ability to build and maintain productive relationships with customers, subordinates, peers and senior management

Title: Business Analyst Lead/Manager
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Moving forward, dynamic, fast-paced environment
macOS/Windows devices and related devices provided
Up to 2 Performance Reviews per year
Skills and Experience:
Job description
About Neyu:
At Neyu, we are building platforms that empower businesses and individuals to share their values with billions worldwide through products and services. We believe that serving others unlocks happiness, health, and more meaningful lives. As a rapidly expanding MarTech company, we operate across Asia—including Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, the Philippines, Indonesia, and India—and are extending our reach into Latin America.
Recognizing opportunities to unlock untapped potential, Neyu Corporation drives growth through innovation, digital platforms, and advanced marketing technology. Our group, a top-ranked direct sales company in Southeast Asia, has over 1,400 team members with a strong presence in these regions.
Through our e-commerce platforms, we create and sell healthcare and pharmaceutical products, particularly within the Nutra niche. Combining core marketing principles with advanced IT, we see limitless opportunities ahead. If you are eager to participate in international projects, gain unique skills, and learn from top leaders, Neyu is the right place for you. 
Neyu is seeking a Manager – Business Analyst to lead business process analysis, optimization, and digital transformation for Telesales, CRM, and ERP systems. This role acts as the bridge between business and technology, ensuring that digital solutions align with business objectives, drive efficiency, and improve system performance. 
Key Responsibilities:
1. Business Analysis & Process Optimization 
Gather, analyze, and document business requirements for Marketing, CRM, ERP, and Telesales platforms. 
Identify bottlenecks and inefficiencies, proposing process improvements to enhance operational performance. 
Work closely with Product Manager and Software development Teams to develop and implement scalable digital solutions.
Collaborate with sales, marketing, and customer service teams to understand business needs and ensure system enhancements align with real-world challenges. 
Keep track of industry trends to suggest AI-driven automation and MarTech innovations that optimize sales and customer engagement. 
2. Product Roadmap & Backlog Management 
Manage and prioritize the product backlog in collaboration with Product Manager to ensure high-impact features are delivered. 
Write user stories, acceptance criteria, and epics, supporting Agile development processes. 
Ensure all system improvements align with long-term scalability, usability, and performance goals. 
3. System Modeling & Documentation 
Utilize UML, BPMN, and data flow diagrams to document business processes and system workflows. 
Create structured documentation covering business logic, wireframes, and API integration requirements. 
4. Agile Project Management & Implementation 
Work closely with Product and IT teams to implement Agile methodologies for project delivery. 
Collaborate with Scrum Masters to maintain efficient sprint planning and backlog grooming.
Ensure smooth execution of system upgrades, automation initiatives, and digital transformation projects. 
5. Cross-Functional Collaboration & Stakeholder Engagement 
Act as a liaison between business, sales, marketing, and technology teams, ensuring alignment between system capabilities and business goals. 
Provide data-driven insights and reports on system performance, efficiency improvements, and business impact. 
Conduct user research and stakeholder interviews to refine system requirements and user experience. 
6. AI, Automation & Emerging Tech Trends 
Keep up with AI-driven process automation, machine learning applications, and predictive analytics for CRM and ERP optimization. 
Identify opportunities for AI-enhanced customer engagement, chatbots, and automation-driven sales processes. 
Stay updated on MarTech, CRM evolution, and new automation tools that can improve workflow efficiency.

Your skills and experience
Experience:
At least 7 years as a Business Analyst/Product Analyst, with 3+ years in a managerial role. 
Experience working with Marketing, CRM, ERP, or Telesales platforms in fast-paced business environments. 
Exposure to AI-driven business automation is a plus.
Technical & Business Skills:
Strong expertise in business process analysis, system optimization, and CRM/ERP enhancement. 
Understanding of Agile methodologies, backlog management, and digital transformation strategies. 
Proficiency in UML, BPMN, wireframing, and data modeling techniques. 
Knowledge of API integrations, SQL, and data-driven decision-making. Tools & Technologies 
Experience with JIRA, Confluence, Visio, Lucidchart, Figma or similar tools. 
Basic understanding of AI-driven analytics, automation platforms, and MarTech tools.
Familiarity with workflow automation tools is an advantage. 
Soft Skills:
Excellent stakeholder communication and ability to bridge the gap between business and tech teams. 
Problem-solving mindset with a structured approach to defining business needs. 
Strong leadership and people management skills to mentor and guide a BA team. 
Education & Certifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Computer Science, Business Administration, or a related field. 
CBAP (Certified Business Analysis Professional), PMI-PBA, PMP, or Agile/Scrum certifications are a plus.

Why you'll love working here
A multinational dynamic working environment that offers various development opportunities where work transcends all traditional boundaries. 
Opportunities to work with a vast global talent pool, bringing together diverse, specialized teams that collaborate seamlessly

Premium health care package

Title: Principal Engineer, Test Automation (Robot Framework)
Skills and Experience:
Job description
The Video Intelligence Product Development team is seeking an experienced and adept engineering leader or principal architect to spearhead the transformation of test strategy and methodology, with a focus on test automation and release readiness. 
The selected candidate will possess strong collaborative and interpersonal skills, enabling them to effectively balance stakeholder interests and deliver upon commitments. The candidate will contribute to a culture of respect and maintain high standards of productivity and accountability. Based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, the successful candidate will integrate test automation expertise into the team and drive the evolution of our release readiness methodology to align with our Agile development practices. 
 Responsibilities: 
Continuously enhance the quality of software and hardware products through the development, execution, and maintenance of comprehensive test plans, test cases, and test scripts. 
Design and construct robust automated testing frameworks for the Video Intelligence engineering team, utilizing tools such as Robot Framework, Playwright, Python, PySpark, Spark, Scala, Shell scripting, JAVA, SQL, Hadoop, Hive, Jenkins, Helios, Azure, Linux, and Github. 
Manage the development and maintenance of a test management system encompassing load generation, data management, test automation execution, and reporting. 
Collaborate with the development team to deliver and integrate automation tests.
Formulate and implement the strategy for end-to-end solution testing, ensuring reliable and robust processes. 
Establish and maintain automation test platforms driven via pipeline integration. 
Establish and maintain test platforms for manual and system-level testing. 
Develop and deploy tools for simulation and scalability testing. 
Direct and mentor a team of engineers, fostering a collaborative culture while providing technical guidance and support. 
Enhance productivity and efficiency through automation and metrics. 
Conduct the timely investigation, triage, and replication of reported issues. 
Interact regularly with support, development, and product management teams to resolve complex problems. 
Adhere to established processes and provide metrics to ensure high product quality. 
(Optional) Experience with Dynatrace, Prometheus, PagerDuty, Moog, Splunk, Elastic, Azure monitor, and Grafana.

Your skills and experience
Bachelor's or Master's degree in a relevant field such as computer science or engineering. 
Minimum 5-7 years of automation development experience, with at least 3 years in a leadership role within a test organization focused on large software systems. 
Proficiency in English, with the ability to communicate effectively, both verbally and in writing, with cross-functional teams from various locations. 
Experience working with cloud-based software solutions. 
Experience with CI/CD methodologies and test automation to enable continuous integration. 
Minimum of 5 years of work experience in manual testing within system and functional test cycles. 
A collaborative team member with creative and innovative approaches to problem-solving. 
Ability to perform under pressure and function effectively in a fast-paced environment, providing strong technical leadership. 
Self-motivated with the ability to work independently. 
Experience working with team members across multiple geographical regions. 
Proficiency in Vietnamese, with the ability to communicate effectively, both verbally and in writing, with the local team in Vietnam.

Title: Cyber Security Engineer (IoT/Hardware/Python)
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Thu nhập cạnh tranh, xứng đáng với năng lực.
Môi trường công nghệ tài chính năng động
Tham gia trực tiếp vào các dự án an ninh hệ thống
Skills and Experience:
Job description
Nghiên cứu và phân tích các lỗ hổng bảo mật liên quan đến phần cứng, thiết bị IoT, và System-on-Chip (SoC), bao gồm các cuộc tấn công side-channel, hardware trojan, và lỗi cấu hình phần cứng.
Thực hiện nghiên cứu tấn công và phòng thủ trên phần cứng và phần mềm nhúng.
Phân tích bảo mật hệ thống trên các hệ thống và/hoặc phần mềm để xác định và nhận diện các lỗ hổng.
Kỹ thuật đảo ngược (reverse engineering) các ứng dụng nhị phân, giao thức và định dạng.
Thiết kế và phát triển các ứng dụng phần mềm.
Ghi chép và truyền đạt kết quả nghiên cứu kỹ thuật một cách hiệu quả cho các nhóm người dùng kỹ thuật và không kỹ thuật.
Phát triển và triển khai các biện pháp giảm thiểu rủi ro, chẳng hạn như mã hóa dựa trên phần cứng, secure boot, và Trusted Execution Environments (TEE).
Giám sát và phân tích các mối đe dọa an ninh mạng nhắm vào thiết bị IoT, bao gồm botnet (như Mirai), DDoS, và tấn công mạng ngang (lateral movement).
Xây dựng các giải pháp bảo mật cho IoT, như quản lý cập nhật OTA (Over-the-Air), xác thực an toàn, và mã hóa giao tiếp.
Phối hợp với nhóm phát triển phần cứng và phần mềm để tích hợp bảo mật từ giai đoạn thiết kế (security by design).

Your skills and experience
Tốt nghiệp Đại học Bách Khoa (HCM hoặc Hà Nội) chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, An ninh mạng, Điện tử, hoặc các lĩnh vực liên quan.
Có ít nhất 2-3 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực an ninh mạng, ưu tiên kinh nghiệm với bảo mật phần cứng, IoT, hoặc SoC.
Thành thạo ngôn ngữ lập trình C, Python và x86/x64 assembly. 
Kiến thức về API và ABI của hệ thống Windows và Linux. 
Kinh nghiệm về kỹ thuật đảo ngược (reverse engineering) phần cứng và phần mềm. 
Kinh nghiệm với các công cụ kỹ thuật đảo ngược, bao gồm IDA Pro và Wireshark.
Kinh nghiệm kỹ thuật đảo ngược các hệ thống và giao thức truyền thông RF.Thành thạo lập trình (Python, C/C++) và phân tích mã nhúng (embedded systems).
Hiểu biết về các công cụ và kỹ thuật phân tích phần mềm tĩnh và động. 
Kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt, khả năng làm việc nhóm, và tư duy phân tích vấn đề.
Tiếng Anh thành thạo (đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật và giao tiếp chuyên môn).

Why you'll love working here
Mức thu nhập gấp 1.5 lần so với thị trường.
Làm việc trong môi trường công nghệ tài chính năng động, có định hướng phát triển lâu dài. 
Tham gia trực tiếp vào các dự án an ninh hệ thống giao dịch tài chính, tạo ảnh hưởng rõ rệt đến sản phẩm và thị trường. 
 Giờ hành chính, nghỉ Thứ Bảy & Chủ Nhật, Nghỉ lễ theo qui định Nhà nước 
BHXH 
Lương tháng 13 
Du lịch

Title: Senior DevOps Engineer
Job Description:

Skills and Experience:
Job description
We're looking for people to join the Access family, who share our passion for believing in better, and who will help us continue to grow. Love Work. Love Life. Be You. - is central to our success and how we give our customers the freedom to do more of what's important to them.
 What does Access offer you?

We offer a flexible, hybrid working environment where you can balance work and life while maintaining a strong office team-based culture. We deliver on what we say, taking the development of our people seriously. We'll work with you to progress your success plan and provide opportunities to accelerate your career.
 On top of a competitive salary, our wellbeing days taking you to 25 days leave a year and a health contribution, you'll also be able to choose from a range of benefits to suit you. We're an organisation that likes to give back, so you'll also have three charity days allocated to support a cause that matters to you.
 About you:

As a Senior DevOps Engineer, you are expected to have 5+ years of experience in working in highly functional Dev Ops teams in a SAAS based environment. You will be working on for both internal and external cloud networks supporting FastTrack360; internal Product & Engineering Team DEV/QAT/REL, external clients consuming the FastTrack360 in either Production/UAT or Training.

As this is a position that heavily interfaces with our Global Team; a strong written and spoken proficiency in English is required.
 Day-to-day you will:
 - Monitor, maintain, patch, and manage security for FastTrack360 hardware and services, ensuring 99.95% uptime.
- Manage capacity and service availability across Internal and FastTrack360 Cloud Networks.
- Handle DevOps activities including new client deployments, upgrades, and source control for infrastructure as code.

Title: Senior Backend Developer (Java/ Golang)
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Thu nhập cạnh tranh, xứng đáng với năng lực.

Skills and Experience:
Job description
Thiết kế, phát triển và duy trì các hệ thống backend hiệu năng cao, đảm bảo khả năng mở rộng, ổn định và tin cậy. 
Xây dựng và tối ưu hóa các API RESTful hoặc GraphQL để hỗ trợ frontend và tích hợp với hệ thống bên thứ ba. 
Làm việc với cơ sở dữ liệu (SQL/NoSQL) để thiết kế cấu trúc dữ liệu (schema), tối ưu truy vấn và đảm bảo hiệu suất hệ thống. 
Đảm bảo an toàn hệ thống qua các cơ chế xác thực, mã hóa và tuân thủ các tiêu chuẩn bảo mật. 
Tham gia code review, hướng dẫn và hỗ trợ phát triển năng lực cho các lập trình viên cấp dưới. 
Hợp tác chặt chẽ với các nhóm DevOps, Frontend và Product để triển khai các tính năng mới. 
Nghiên cứu, đề xuất và áp dụng công nghệ mới nhằm nâng cao hiệu quả hệ thống và trải nghiệm người dùng.

Your skills and experience
Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Khoa học máy tính hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan. 
Có ít nhất 5 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển backend, trong đó tối thiểu 2 năm đảm nhiệm vai trò Senior hoặc tương đương. 
Thành thạo một trong hai ngôn ngữ lập trình: Java hoặc Golang. 
Có kinh nghiệm vững về thiết kế, triển khai hệ thống theo kiến trúc microservices, sử dụng Docker và Kubernetes. 
Thành thạo cơ sở dữ liệu: PostgreSQL, MongoDB hoặc Redis. 
Có kinh nghiệm với các hệ thống hàng đợi như RabbitMQ, Kafka hoặc AWS SQS. 
Hiểu biết tốt về CI/CD, các nền tảng đám mây như AWS, GCP, Azure, và các công cụ giám sát như Prometheus, Grafana. 
Tư duy logic tốt, kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề mạnh, có khả năng làm việc nhóm hiệu quả. 
Ưu tiên ứng viên có năng lực toán học tốt hoặc từng đạt giải trong các kỳ thi toán học. 
Ưu tiên ứng viên từng tham gia phát triển hệ thống quy mô lớn hoặc các sản phẩm SaaS.

Why you'll love working here
Thu nhập cạnh tranh, xứng đáng với năng lực.

Viết và duy trì test scripts tự động bằng Selenium, Appium hoặc các công cụ automation khác.
Thực hiện API testing, kiểm tra dữ liệu backend sử dụng Postman hoặc các công cụ tương tự.
 Sử dụng SQL hoặc MongoDB để xác minh dữ liệu liên quan đến quá trình kiểm thử.
Liên tục tối ưu quy trình kiểm thử, đề xuất cải tiến giúp nâng cao hiệu quả và chất lượng sản phẩm.

Từ 3-5 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực kiểm thử phần mềm (QA/QC), ưu tiên ứng viên từng tham gia nhiều giai đoạn phát triển sản phẩm.

Có tinh thần trách nhiệm cao, chủ động, chịu được áp lực và khả năng làm việc nhóm cũng như làm việc độc lập.

Title: Engineering Operations Manager (Agile, POD)
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Hybrid and flexible working environment
Innovative Product
Growth Opportunities
Skills and Experience:
Job description
As an Engineering Operations Manager, you will be responsible for the management and reporting of our POD-based engineering teams. You will lead one or more agile teams to plan, deliver, and support service features that create customer value and enhance service capabilities.
In this role, you will work closely with the Operations Director and other senior executives to monitor project delivery, evaluate POD performance, and identify opportunities for improvement. You will also collaborate with the HR team to lead performance reviews alongside Team Leads and the CTO, and support recruitment efforts as needed.
About PAVE - A product of Discovery Loft
PAVE 🔧🚗is an innovative automotive technology company transforming the way the world inspects vehicles. Powered by Intelligent Damage Detection capabilities, PAVE enables anyone with a smartphone to complete a guided vehicle inspection simply by taking photos of their car.
Headquartered in Toronto, our team brings deep expertise from both the automotive and technology industries, blending the best of artificial intelligence and automotive intelligence.
For more information, visit pave.ai.
ABOUT THE JOB
Technical & Delivery Management
Plan and structure engineering teams using the POD model — ensuring each POD has the right blend of skills to independently deliver product features.
Oversee engineering metrics, technical delivery roadmaps, and compliance with PAVE’s risk and quality frameworks.
Reporting regularly to Ops Director, CTO and Senior leadership.
Ability to convert product systems and processes into well-structured technical documentation.
Team Structuring & Talent Acquisition
Design team configurations (PODs) based on product and business needs.
Collaborate with HR to define hiring requirements, participate in technical interviews, and onboard new team members effectively.
Build succession plans and define career paths for engineering roles across the product teams.
People Leadership & Development
Conduct 1:1s, probation reviews, and career development plans.
Coach engineers to expand into T-shaped capabilities, fostering ownership beyond their core skillset.
Drive a learning-based culture with an ability to set and gain agreement for realistic and stretching objectives for the team.
Cross-functional Collaboration
Partner closely with Product, Design, and HR teams to ensure alignment on business goals and team resource planning.
Evangelize Agile and DevOps best practices and drive continuous improvement.

Your skills and experience
Must have:
4+ years working with Engineering teams; 3+ years leading Agile or POD teams.
Proven experience in large-scale Agile delivery and DevOps practices.
Deep understanding of SDLC (Scrum, Kanban, Waterfall).
Hands-on experience in converting systems/processes into technical documentation.
Strong skills in people leadership, coaching, and cross-team collaboration.
Excellent stakeholder management and resource optimization (e.g. PODs).
Experience in managing code and change management processes.
Strong English communication skills, both verbal and written.

Why you'll love working here
1. Competitive Compensation & Perks
Attractive salary package.
15 days of annual leave.
Year-end bonus equal to one month’s salary.
Premium healthcare coverage for you and your family.
Thoughtful appreciation gifts throughout the year.
2. Growth & Learning Opportunities
Work on cutting-edge, large-scale products in the car inspection field.
Clear career paths for both technical experts and aspiring leaders.
Continuous learning programs to sharpen your skills and grow your career.
Learn from everything, everywhere—but be a smart copy-paster, not a copycat!
Be ready to embrace and implement new ideas in a fast-paced environment.
3. An Inspiring Workplace
Flexible hybrid work model and a strong focus on work-life balance.
A modern, fully-equipped Office with a well-stocked pantry.
Be motivated, creative, and passionate—we can’t ask for more!
Respect and care for your teammates, your environment, and even yourself.
Treat yourself well, and while you’re at it, save the Earth too.
4. A Mindset for Growth
Have the courage to move fast, stay flexible, and take full responsibility for every single line of code.
Always look back at your work and strive to make it better—nothing is perfect, and that’s where you come in.
It’s okay to be late sometimes, but make sure you’re fully accountable and aware of your actions.
5. A Dynamic and Open Culture
We don’t stick rigidly to the gameplan, so feel free to add or remove your own “blah blah” from this list. 😉

Hỗ trợ chẩn đoán, xử lý sự cố và áp dụng các yêu cầu cải tiến cho các ứng dụng ngân hàng trực tuyến đã triển khai
Thực hiện các công việc khác theo phân công của cấp trên
Xây dựng/tham gia xây dựng, hỗ trợ triển khai chính sách, quy chế, quy định, quy trình liên quan
Tham gia xây dựng các chính sách, quy chế, quy định, quy trình liên quan tới  hoạt động của đơn vị.
Tham gia đào tạo, phổ biến, hướng dẫn, giám sát việc triển khai chính sách, quy định, quy chế, quy trình.
Phát triển cá nhân
Tu dưỡng đạo đức, rèn luyện tác phong làm việc theo hướng chuyên nghiệp, hiện đại.
Tham gia các khóa đào tạo, tự đào tạo nhằm không ngừng nâng cao khả năng hiểu biết, trình độ chuyên môn nghiệp vụ và kiến thức, kỹ năng làm việc.
Xây dựng kế hoạch phát triển cá nhân phù hợp với xu hướng phát triển của hệ thống nhằm đáp ứng ngày càng tốt hơn yêu cầu của công việc và tổ chức.
Tuân thủ
Tuân thủ các quy định của pháp luật và quy định của HDBank trong quá trình thực hiện nghiệp vụ.Tuân thủ các quy tắc đạo đức nghề nghiệp của HDBank.
Tuân thủ sự điều động công tác và phân công công việc của Lãnh đạo có thẩm quyền.
Thực hiện nhiệm vụ khác do Lãnh đạo có thẩm quyền phân công.

Your skills and experience
Kiến thức & kinh nghiệm làm việc: 
Học vấn: Tốt nghiệp Đại học các chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Khoa học máy tính, Toán Tin ứng dụng, Kỹ thuật máy tính, Trí tuệ nhân tạo hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan.
Kỹ năng ngoại ngữ: Có khả năng đọc hiểu tài liệu chuyên ngành AI/Machine Learning bằng tiếng Anh.
Yêu cầu kinh nghiệm: 
Machine Learning & Deep Learning: Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc với các bài toán thị giác máy tính (Computer Vision), đặc biệt liên quan đến OCR tài liệu, nhận diện khuôn mặt, xác thực EKYC.
Lập trình Python: Thành thạo Python, có kinh nghiệm xây dựng pipeline huấn luyện và tiền xử lý dữ liệu cho AI/ML.
Làm việc với dữ liệu lớn: Có kinh nghiệm quản lý, xử lý và huấn luyện mô hình trên tập dữ liệu hình ảnh lớn (hàng trăm ngàn đến hàng chục triệu ảnh), biết cách tối ưu hóa pipeline dữ liệu (ví dụ: dùng TensorFlow Data API, multiprocessing, TFRecords, augmentation hiệu quả trên quy mô lớn).
Framework AI: Thành thạo TensorFlow hoặc công nghệ tương đương, nắm vững cách xây dựng, huấn luyện và tối ưu hóa mô hình. Có khả năng làm việc với PyTorch hoặc các nền tảng khác là điểm cộng.
Xử lý ảnh: Có kinh nghiệm sử dụng OpenCV, Pillow hoặc các thư viện xử lý ảnh để chuẩn hóa, tăng cường dữ liệu, và hỗ trợ quá trình huấn luyện mô hình.
Kiến thức thuật toán: Hiểu rõ các mô hình CNN, RNN/LSTM, Transformer ứng dụng trong OCR và nhận diện khuôn mặt. Có kinh nghiệm thực tế về Transfer Learning, Fine-tuning mô hình pre-trained.
Cơ sở dữ liệu: Biết cách tổ chức, lưu trữ và trích xuất dữ liệu huấn luyện từ các nguồn như SQL hoặc NoSQL.
Triển khai mô hình: Có kinh nghiệm đưa mô hình AI vào sản phẩm thực tế bằng TensorFlow Serving, TensorFlow Lite hoặc các phương pháp tối ưu mô hình inference.
Kỹ năng: 
Kỹ năng phân tích và giải quyết vấn đề liên quan đến việc tối ưu độ chính xác mô hình, tốc độ suy luận và chất lượng ảnh đầu vào.
Kỹ năng nghiên cứu, đọc hiểu tài liệu học thuật, paper mới về OCR, Face Recognition và eKYC.
Kỹ năng giao tiếp rõ ràng, phối hợp chặt chẽ với đội phát triển sản phẩm để tích hợp mô hình vào hệ thống.
Kỹ năng làm việc nhóm, hỗ trợ đồng đội và đóng góp tích cực vào dự án.
Kỹ năng quản lý thời gian để hoàn thành công việc đúng tiến độ.
Kỹ năng trình bày ý tưởng mạch lạc, thuyết phục.
Tố chất & sở thích công việc: 
Chính trực, đáng tin cậy trong công việc.
Tự tin, sáng tạo, sẵn sàng đề xuất giải pháp mới.
Chịu được áp lực công việc trong môi trường có yêu cầu cao.
Thích làm việc trong môi trường chuyên nghiệp, năng động tại HDBank.

Why you'll love working here
Đánh giá và xét thưởng tương xứng với năng lực.
Được làm việc tại Ngân hàng duy nhất tại Việt Nam đạt giải thưởng “Nơi làm việc tốt nhất Châu Á” 5 năm liên tiếp.
Phúc lợi tuyệt vời sẽ thúc đẩy động lực làm việc, tạo năng lượng tích cực cho bạn và gia đình suốt quá trình làm việc tại đây.

Title: Backend Developer (NodeJS, NestJS, TypeScript, MongoDB)
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Cutting-edge tech
Pro growth opportunities
Collaborative culture
Skills and Experience:
Job description
Avian Solutions is a dynamic and rapidly growing aviation software startup. We pride ourselves on fostering a collaborative and growth-oriented environment where creativity and technical expertise are highly valued. We are currently seeking a skilled Backend Developer to join our team and contribute to our exciting projects.
 You'll be responsible for: As a Backend Developer at Avian Solutions, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining robust and scalable backend systems. You will work closely with our frontend developers, product managers, and other stakeholders to deliver high-quality software solutions. Your expertise in NodeJS, NestJS, and other relevant technologies will be crucial in driving the success of our projects.
 You'll love working with us if you are: 
Passionate about technology 
Independent but also a good team player 
Product mindset 
Strong willingness to learn new practices and technologies 
Keen on presenting your ideas to your peers and management

Your skills and experience
1. Must-Have Requirements:
This section outlines the essential skills and experience required for this role. Candidates who do not meet these criteria are unlikely to be considered.
Technical Skills:
Minimum of 2+ years of proven experience in a similar Backend Engineer role.
Strong proficiency in designing, developing, and maintaining efficient, reusable, and reliable backend code using NodeJS and NestJS.
Experience in implementing data storage solutions with NoSQL databases, particularly MongoDB.
Solid understanding and practical experience in deploying and managing containerized applications using Docker and Docker Compose.
Hands-on experience in configuring and maintaining Nginx for load balancing and reverse proxying.
Experience in working with micro-services based architectures to build scalable and modular systems.
Proficiency in writing and maintaining unit tests to ensure code quality and facilitate debugging.
Experience operating within a Linux server environment, performing necessary maintenance and optimization tasks.
Soft Skills:
A positive, "Can-Do" attitude and a strong ability to collaborate effectively with team members.
Good English communication skills are essential, with the ability to clearly articulate technical concepts and participate effectively in discussions related to work.
2. Nice-to-Have Requirements:
While not mandatory, the following skills and experiences would be advantageous and will be considered a plus:
Ensure the performance, quality, and responsiveness of applications. 
Collaborate with frontend developers to integrate user-facing elements with server-side logic.

Title: Data Analytic Team Lead
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Flexible Friday afternoon
18 Annual Leave + 5 Recharge Days/ Year
Hybrid working model
Skills and Experience:
Job description
At Pizza Hut Global, we want to build the Winning Recipe for our Customers and Team to connect people through the joy of pizza. Taking a fact based, data driven approach is fundamental to us focusing on the right areas. Pizza Hut Global has a vast amount of Operational Data to surface insights for our Team and Key Markets to improve the Customer Experience, execution of standards and to increase sales. 

We’re looking for someone with a proven track record to be our Data Analyst Team Lead for the CX Team who is passionate about leveraging data to solve business problems and make data driven strategic decisions. They should have the ability to dive deep into the data sets, set up user friendly dashboards, present data back in a clear concise format utilizing Dashboards, Excel & PPT and plan a calendar of analysis to manage the intake.

Reporting to the Insights Manager and supporting the CX Team, you would work closely with the HutBot Data Team in Vietnam to ensure that we are sharing learnings across teams.


JOB FUNCTIONS: 
1. Data Analysis & Reporting: Lead the collection, cleaning, and analysis of data from multiple sources, and drive the production of business insights. Guide analysts in designing and delivering actionable reports and dashboards, ensuring alignment with business objectives.
2. Ad-Hoc Analysis: Create and oversee on-demand analysis for various business functions. Provide strategic insights to support business queries and decision-making, mentoring analysts in the process.
3. Business Insights & Strategy: Partner with business leaders to translate data into meaningful insights that shape business strategies. Lead the development and communication of key findings, ensuring they support cross-departmental decision-making and drive business growth.
4. Data Visualization & Dashboards: Lead the creation of dynamic, visually compelling dashboards that track key metrics and performance indicators. Ensure junior analysts are developing effective visualizations that support data-driven decisions.
5. Data Modeling: Leverage advanced data modeling techniques to predict outcomes and forecast performance based on historical data. Mentor analysts in developing predictive models and applying statistical techniques.
6. Data Integration: Work closely with data engineering and technical teams to ensure seamless data integration across systems. Lead efforts to improve the flow of data and maintain its accuracy and efficiency.
7. Data Quality & Integrity: Take ownership of data quality assurance efforts, ensuring the accuracy, consistency, and integrity of data across platforms. Guide analysts in identifying and resolving data discrepancies.
8. Leadership & Mentorship: Lead and mentor a team of analysts, providing coaching and guidance on analysis, reporting, and professional development. Foster a collaborative team environment, ensuring analysts are empowered to take on challenging projects.
9. Presentation & Communication: Deliver clear and impactful presentations of data insights and recommendations to senior leadership. Guide the team in effectively communicating analysis results through reports, dashboards, and presentations.

Your skills and experience
KNOWLEDGE AND SKILL REQUIRED:
Experience: 5+ years in a similar data analysis or BI role, with proven leadership experience in guiding and mentoring analysts. Prior experience in the restaurant industry is a plus.
 Technical Skills: 
• Expertise in Snowflake for data warehousing and querying, with a deep understanding of data    architecture and modeling.
•    Advanced proficiency in BI tools like DOMO, Power BI, and others for data reporting and visualization.
•    Expertise in SQL and experience with data analysis tools like Excel.
•    Experience with ETL processes and cloud-based data platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP).
•    Strong understanding of statistical methods and predictive analytics.

Leadership Abilities: Proven ability to lead, mentor, and develop a team of analysts, managing workflows and ensuring team success.
Cross-functional Collaboration: Experience working effectively with cross-functional teams, driving data-driven decisions and influencing business outcomes.
Communication & Presentation: Strong written and verbal communication skills with the ability to present complex data insights to non-technical stakeholders. Ability to provide clear recommendations based on data analysis.
Organizational Skills: Strong organizational, time management, and documentation skills. Ability to manage multiple priorities and projects.
Proactive & Results-Oriented: A self-motivated problem-solver who thrives in fast-paced environments, with a focus on achieving measurable outcomes.
Additional Experience (Advantageous): Familiarity with user experience analysis tools (e.g., Content Square) and advanced data visualization techniques.

Flexible Friday afternoon
Full salary insurance
