Title: Product Designer (English)
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Attractive salary package and valuable benefits
Get the opportunity to access global L&D programs
Hybrid and flexible working environment
Skills and Experience:
Job description
At HRS, we are redefining corporate travel and lodging with a technology-driven approach that prioritizes efficiency, sustainability, and user satisfaction. Our innovative solutions are transforming the landscape of corporate travel management, making business travel simpler and smarter for global enterprises. With over 50 years of experience, our digital platform, driven by ProcureTech, TravelTech, BPATech and FinTech, reinvents how companies and travelers Stay, Work, and Pay - cohesively brought together by our Lodging as a Service solution.
ProcureTech digitally revolutionizes lodging and meeting procurement, connecting corporations and suppliers in a cutting-edge ecosystem. 
TravelTech redefines the lodging and meeting experience, offering personalized content from selection to check-in, ensuring an unparalleled journey for corporate travelers. 
BPATech provides advanced user process automation into highly specialized industry contexts involving large-scale project travel and crew deployments.
In FinTech brings advancements like mobile banking and digital payments to corporate lodging and meetings, turning corporate back offices into touchless business enablers, eliminating legacy cost barriers.
Combining these technology propositions, HRS unlocks exponential catalyst effects. Our data-driven focus delivers value-added services and high-return network effects, creating substantial customer value. Beyond cost savings in the global post-pandemic economy, HRS clients gain from an unrivaled focus on essential aspects including safety, security and satisfaction. HRS's exponential growth since 1972 serves over 35% of the global Fortune 500 and leading hotel chains.
 Business Unit
HRS' Product Management department is a critical function in driving the success of the company's Lodging-as-a-Service (LaaS), Meeting-as-a-Service (MaaS) and Workforce-as-a-Service (WaaS) platform offerings. The department collaborates with cross-functional teams to define the product vision, roadmap, and strategy, and prioritizes features using analytics and data to meet business goals and deliver an exceptional experience for stakeholders.
The teams in the Product Management department at HRS own the program backlog, define product increments and releases, and are responsible for the product vision, roadmap, pricing, licensing, and ROI. They have strong business and technical knowledge and excellent communication and prioritization skills.
The department operates based on HRS' leadership principles, putting the customer view first and striving for customer success over commercial success. They think and act big, challenging the status quo, and constantly leaving their comfort zones to achieve growth. As coaches, they hire the ones most likely to win and help develop team members to become the best through radical candid feedback.
Product Designers at HRS are learning pioneers, continually seeking to improve processes, products, commercial models, technologies, and ways of working. They take ownership of the entire customer experience, seeking truth and committing to decisions once they are made. To succeed in the role, candidates must possess strong business and technical know-how, prioritize tasks accurately, and have excellent communication skills. They must also have an up-to-date knowledge of the latest trends and technologies and be comfortable presenting their ideas to internal stakeholders.
 Position
As a key member of our Travel Tech team, you’ll design intuitive, seamless experiences that serve the diverse needs of corporate travellers, travel agents, and meeting planners. From web tools to APIs, you'll craft solutions that simplify complex journeys and scale globally.
You’ll partner closely with product managers, engineers, marketers, and sales teams to turn insights into powerful, user-centred products. You will be at the forefront of tackling the usability risk - ensuring our products not only work but are intuitive, efficient, and impactful for customers. Through close collaboration, strategic design, and user-driven insights, you will help shape products that deliver measurable value to both users and the business.  
 Challenge
Usability Ownership: Focus on eliminating friction points in the user journey, ensuring designs solve real problems and meet user expectations with clarity and ease of use. 
Discovery & Hypothesis Validation: Partner with the two other roles of the Product Trio to identify customer problems, explore potential solutions, and validate hypotheses through user research and rapid prototyping. 
Continuous User Research: Plan and execute qualitative and quantitative research activities—such as user interviews, contextual inquiries, workshops, and usability tests—to uncover actionable insights. 
Strategic Design Execution: Translate research findings into interactive prototypes and pixel-perfect designs, ensuring usability and simplicity even for complex workflows, and initiating change initiatives through narrative document analysis (we use Amazon 6-pager method). 
Iterative Delivery: Collaborate closely with engineers during implementation, ensuring design quality and consistency throughout the Delivery process. Ensure that the implementation is measurable and that iteration only stops if the defined goal is achieved. 
Design System Contribution: Enhance and maintain our proprietary Design System to ensure consistency and scalability across all platforms. 
Your work will directly shape an intuitive platform for booking workspaces, meeting rooms, and accommodations, improving the experience for business travelers and corporate bookers while seamlessly integrating with third-party applications.

Your skills and experience
4+ years of experience in product design (B2B/B2C), simplifying complex processes into intuitive, user-friendly interfaces. 
Strong expertise in usability testing and addressing usability risk through hypothesis-driven design and continuous iteration, with a data focused way of working. 
A collaborative mindset, thriving as part of the Product Trio (PM, Designer, Engineer) to ensure product success. 
Proficiency in design tools and research platforms like Figma, Miro, Dovetail, and User Interviews. 
Experience in user-centered research methods and translating insights into actionable design solutions. 
Excellent written and spoken communication skills in the English language, with the ability to advocate for usability and align diverse stakeholders. 
A passion for agile product development and a clear understanding of modern Discovery and Delivery practices.

Why you'll love working here
Full salary and benefits as an official employee on probation.
Hybrid working model.
Open and flat environment, highly appreciate your idea and constantly supporting your skill development.
Innovative and international learning and development program, we dedicate to supporting employees’ growth and development of skills.
Challenging products with onsite opportunities in Europe (Germany, Australia, Poland, etc.).
13th-month salary & short-term incentives: we offer incentives as defined by the company’s success in the previous year.
15+ annual leaves per year.
Full healthcare compliance.
Premium healthcare for employees.
Gifts for every special occasion.
Supportive working conditions: Laptop, MS Surface Hub.
Free and unlimited snacks, tea, coffee, and by-choice request.
Premium company trip & business traveling programs and other exciting activities.
Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thanks for your interest!

Job description
Introduction
Our Project: 
“When we explore someplace, we leave it better than we found it” - this is our Exo Trails mission, an app created by nature enthusiasts to promote the health and social benefits of an outdoor lifestyle while adhering to leaving positive footprints on every trail we venture.
 Exo Trails is a community driven app designed by nature enthusiasts to encourage people to explore scenic trails in Vietnam. Our aim is to be the first and only official Vietnamese app that delivers accurate data, easy-to-use interfaces, clear navigations, and relevant information with clear descriptions and photos.
 Our mission is to populate the Exo Trails app with massive trail data for all sorts of activities from picnicking, camping, hiking, cycling, overlanding to mountain trekking. This coincides with the tremendous growth in the outdoor activity sector which has been growing tremendously since the pandemic. With the eventual full return of foreign tourists, Exo Trails will definitely benefit as a solid alternative to explore this great country instead of relying on commercial tour operators. Exo Trails will allow tourists the freedom to explore confidently and independently.
 Our vision is to ensure that every Vietnamese with available means of transportation or interest in the great outdoors will find our Exo Trails app extremely useful. We will constantly update trails, verify data and add exciting features to it. We will also provide a special program for rural farmers to navigate some undiscovered trails by awarding tokens or rewards to better their communities as we progress into future growth of our app.

What we’re looking for
We are looking for an experienced and passionate AI Engineer to join our team and work on cutting-edge projects that aim to transform the way our users engage with products on our platform. You will be a key player in developing and enhancing AI-powered solutions that elevate user experience and drive innovation across our marketplace.
You’ll be working on two major projects:
Chatbot LLM (Large Language Model): Develop AI-powered chatbots to help users discover products more effectively and assist sellers in learning about the products they are selling.
Product Recommendation System: Build intelligent recommendation engines to suggest personalized products to users on our eCommerce platform, improving user satisfaction and sales performance.
This is a great opportunity for someone who is passionate about leveraging AI in real-world applications and has the technical expertise to make an impact.
Responsibilities
Chatbot LLM Development:
Design, develop, and maintain advanced chatbot systems powered by LLMs to enhance product discovery and seller learning in the marketplace.

Product Recommendation System:
Build and optimize recommendation algorithms to provide personalized product suggestions based on user behavior, preferences, and browsing patterns.
Work on data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model development for recommendation engines.
Continuously monitor, test, and refine algorithms to ensure they remain effective and scalable.

Conduct research on new techniques, algorithms, and frameworks to improve the performance and scalability of AI systems.
Collaboration and Communication:
Collaborate with product managers, data scientists, and other engineers to ensure seamless integration of AI features into the platform.
Provide clear communication and presentations of AI model outcomes, challenges, and results to stakeholders.
Performance Optimization:
Monitor the performance of AI models in production and fine-tune them for scalability and efficiency.
Implement best practices for deploying AI systems at scale.

Required Skills and Experience
Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, AI, Machine Learning, or a related field.
Experience:
At least 3-5 years of hands-on experience in AI, Machine Learning, or Natural Language Processing (NLP).
Experience building and deploying AI models for real-world applications.
Strong knowledge of machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or Keras.
Solid understanding of NLP (Natural Language Processing) techniques, especially in the context of LLMs (GPT, BERT, etc.).
Experience with recommendation systems and collaborative filtering techniques.
Expertise in programming languages like Python, Java, or Scala.
Nice to Have:
Experience with deploying and maintaining large-scale AI models in production environments.
Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure.
Familiarity with big data technologies (e.g., Hadoop, Spark) for handling large-scale datasets.
Familiarity with reinforcement learning for chatbot development or product recommendations.
Knowledge of APIs and working with back-end services to integrate AI models

This includes opportunities to work with and integrate Artificial Intelligence into our production environment to enhance our platform's capabilities. If you are passionate about building high-quality software, solving complex problems, fostering technical growth in others, and exploring the practical application of AI, we want to hear from you. 
What You Will Do: 
Technical Leadership & Architecture: Lead the technical design, development, and implementation of new web applications and core system modules, ensuring they are built for scalability, performance, and maintainability. 
System Ownership: Take ownership of key parts of our web infrastructure, including existing systems and legacy code, ensuring their stability, performance, and security. 
Collaboration & Strategy: Work closely with Product Owners and stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical specifications and deliver impactful solutions. Provide accurate technical estimations, plan project timelines, and contribute to technical roadmap discussions. 
Integration Expertise: Design and implement seamless integrations with critical third-party services (e.g., payment gateways, logistics providers, marketplaces, and AI services/models) to enhance our platform's capabilities. 
Mentorship & Growth: Actively mentor and guide junior developers, sharing your knowledge, best practices, and helping them grow their technical skills and careers. 
Operational Excellence: Provide technical support and troubleshooting for operational issues, ensuring a smooth experience for our users and internal teams. 
Quality & Best Practices: Champion code quality, participate in and lead code reviews, contribute to knowledge sharing sessions, and advocate for continuous improvement in our development processes and tooling. 
System Evolution: Proactively identify areas for technical improvement, refactoring, and optimization within our existing systems, including exploring opportunities to leverage AI technologies.

Your skills and experience
Requirements: 
1. Education background requirements: : Bachelor's degree in a relevant field (e.g., Business, Computer Science, Engineering) or equivalent practical experience. 
2. Experience/Industry requirements:  
Extensive Web Development Experience: Proven track record of designing, building, and deploying complex web applications from conception to production. 
Strong Background in E-commerce Domain (Preferred): Strong understanding of the challenges and common patterns in the e-commerce space. 
Database Mastery: Deep expertise in designing database schemas, optimizing queries, and managing databases like PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, and Elasticsearch. 
Distributed Systems & Messaging: Hands-on experience working with message queue systems such as RabbitMQ or Kafka. 
Solid Front-End Proficiency: Solid understanding of modern front-end development principles and best practices. 
Containerization & Cloud: Experience with containerization technologies (Docker) and deploying applications on cloud platforms ([Specify your cloud provider, e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure]). 
DevOps & CI/CD: Practical experience setting up and maintaining CI/CD pipelines using tools like GitHub Actions, and a strong commitment to automation. 
Testing Excellence: Experience writing and advocating for comprehensive unit, integration, and potentially end-to-end tests. 
Architectural Acumen: Demonstrated ability to design and reason about complex system architectures, focusing on scalability, reliability, and maintainability. 
Problem Solving: Exceptional analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to break down complex issues and find elegant solutions. 
Mentorship: Experience mentoring or leading junior developers. 
AI Experience: Experience working with Artificial Intelligence concepts, models, or integrating AI services into production applications. 
Technical Proficiencies (Our Current Stack / Openness to Learn): 
Programming Languages: We are open to candidates with strong backgrounds in various languages who are willing to learn our core languages, which currently include Elixir, Golang, Node.js 
Databases: PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, Elasticsearch 
Message Queues: RabbitMQ, Kafka

Monitoring: Grafana, Prometheus (plus)

English communication (written and verbal) 
Team player with collaborative mindset
Creative problem-solver who focuses on priorities 
Adaptable to new technologies and ideas 
Experience with microservices architecture.

If you are passionate about working with the latest technologies, thrive in a collaborative team setting, and are excited about making an impact in the world of eCommerce, we want to hear from you..
Responsibilities
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and maintain microservices for our eCommerce platform.
Implement and optimize backend services using Spring Boot, .NET Core, and other relevant technologies.
Apply Domain-Driven Design (DDD) and Command Query Responsibility Segregation (CQRS) principles to ensure the scalability and maintainability of our services.
Containerize applications with Docker and manage orchestration using Kubernetes (K8s).
Work with cloud services, particularly Azure, for scalability, reliability, and security.
Develop and maintain data storage solutions, including Postgres and Redis.
Write clean, maintainable code and perform code reviews to ensure code quality.
Collaborate with front-end developers to create robust APIs that enhance customer experience.
Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve technical issues to ensure system reliability.
Stay updated with emerging trends and technologies in backend development.

Your skills and experience
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field (or equivalent work experience).
Demonstrated experience in backend development using Spring Boot and .NET Core.
Strong database development skills, including Postgres and Redis.
Solid understanding of RESTful API design and microservices architecture
Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work effectively in a team.
Strong understanding of software architecture patterns (e.g., Clean Architecture, DDD, CQRS)
Good communication skills and a willingness to learn and adapt in a dynamic environment.
Familiarity with Docker and Kubernetes for containerization and orchestration is a plus.
Experience working with cloud platforms, preferably Azure is a plus

Why you'll love working here
Engaging and challenging work environment, focusing on the exciting domain of eCommerce.
Hybrid working model with flexible hours.
Employee Stock Ownership Program (ESOP): Enjoy the opportunity to be a company stakeholder through our ESOP, fostering a sense of shared success and ownership.

Title: Scrum Master
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Health insurance covered for employee & dependent
Technical seminars and soft skill training courses
Professional and dynamic working environment
Skills and Experience:
Job description
The Scrum Master is a coach and leads squads to deliver outcomes through the Agile way of working. This role instils the agreed-to Agile process, helps remove impediments to progress, and fosters an environment of high performance, continuous flow, and relentless improvement
 Responsibilities:
Responsible for coaching, supporting and mentoring scrum framework practices and Agile principles to the teams, Product owner and the organization
Lead and facilitate Scrum events using Agile practices, tools and processes and create consistency of delivery practices across the teams
Be the driving force and guide teams to be self-organized, promote a collaborative team environment that foster creativity, innovation, continuous improvement and celebrate successes
Gather, analyze, and present data to business stakeholders in a way that demonstrates how the team is improving and growing
Collaborate with Product Owners to maximize productivity and to ensure effective backlog management
Manage and build strong, trusted relationships with Engineers and Product Owners to track status of implementation and improve requirements and vision
Maintain sprint flow by minimizing external disturbances, manage risks or impediments and remove blockers and hurdles
Leaders at all levels will be expected to ensure their teams are clear, capable and motivated:
Clear about purpose, values, goals and plans, expectations and processes, and the boundaries of ethical decision making
Capable with the right talent, time, tools and skills to do their work, with leaders expected to manage resources (people, budgets, assets) and coach teams to build competence and confidence
Motivated by leaders who build trust, inclusive teams and a psychologically safe environment, track results, and provide clear follow-up and feedback

Your skills and experience
8+ years experience across agile ways of working and delivery, with in-depth knowledge of agile techniques: creating user stories, defining acceptance criteria and managing squad artefacts
Ability to navigate a large complex organization and build relationships with stakeholders using formal and informal networks
Ability to measure performance and create an environment of continuous learning
Experience in leading and coaching teams (8-12 people)
Extensive experience in a previous scrum master role
Experience with multiple teams simultaneously and/or with teams in a complex environment
Experience with workflow tools (e. g., Rally, Jira)
Essential capabilities:
Excellent analytical, troubleshooting & documentation skills
Strong delivery focus with an active approach to quality and auditability
Ability to work under pressure and excel within a fast-paced environment
Strong written and verbal communication skills
Excellent collaboration and interpersonal skills
Ability to self-manage tasks
Agile software development practices
Leadership qualities and skills
Stakeholder management
Ability to speak to data engineers and support them.
Key Performance Indicators:
Delivery of team as expected (time, quality, budget, scope)
Sprint Goal Success
Feature Cycle Time
Team Velocity
Sprint Burndown
Learnings from retrospectives and showcases
Team Engagement

Why you'll love working here
Life at Capgemini is dynamic and fun, a place where people love to work. A career with freedom, full of learning and development opportunities and the support to help you achieve your best.
A career at Capgemini is rewarding and constantly transforming. Here are the top ten reasons why people love working at Capgemini.
1. Your values are our values: 
We’re guided by seven core values: honesty, boldness, trust, freedom, team spirit, modesty, and fun. If you share those values, then you’ll find your place with us.
2. People come first
Through our People Charter, we encourage free exchange of ideas, respect for differences, and wellbeing in the workplace for everyone.
3. Never stop learning
At the Capgemini Group University, you’ll learn via classroom-based and virtual courses, e-learning modules and rich-media online resources.
4. Feel free to grow
Over the course of your career, your goals may shift. Want to change your focus? Switch tracks? We’re here to help.
5. Get inspired by your colleagues
Our cultural diversity means you’ll always have something to learn from those around you.
6. Forget the notion of the “typical day”
Challenge and variety are constants here. From the work you do to the people you meet to the places you travel, we’ll keep you on your toes.
7. Strike a balance that works for you
You’re human—and so are we! We strive to make sure our employees achieve a healthy, happy work-life balance.
8.Count on us for career growth
We’re always growing and so should you. We prioritize the personal development of our team members with our Capgemini Group University.
9.Your Love for Travel
We have 300 offices in 40 countries around the world. You’ll have opportunities to travel or work in different locations.
 10.Dig in your first day
Whether you join us as a recent graduate or a seasoned professional, you’ll start to work directly on challenging projects from day one.

Title: Technical Manager
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Advance your career in the gaming industry
Take ownership and grow with global talents
Build games played by millions worldwide
Skills and Experience:
Job description
The Technical Manager will lead a cross-functional development team to deliver and scale our game portal’s core features, community functionalities, and content integrations. This role requires deep technical expertise, strong leadership, and a proven ability to manage agile teams in a fast-paced startup environment. The manager will drive the implementation of social, loyalty, and game integration features while ensuring alignment with short-term growth and long-term retention goals. 
 Key Responsibilities: 
 1. Team Leadership and Management: 
  Lead, mentor, and manage a team of developers (backend, frontend, game developers) to deliver high-quality features on time.
Foster a collaborative, Agile culture with clear sprint goals and regular retrospectives to improve team performance.
Allocate resources effectively to balance quick wins (e.g., loyalty system release) with long-term feature development (e.g., community features).
Conduct performance reviews, provide feedback, and support career development for team members. 
 2. Technical Oversight: 
 + Oversee the architecture, development, and maintenance of the game portal using technologies such as: 
  Backend: Go, TypeScript, RESTful APIs, Kafka (queued messaging), Redis (caching), MySQL (database). 
Frontend: React Native for app clients. 
Game Development: Cocos Creator for self-developed games. 
Integration: OAuth 2.0 for external platforms and mini-game integrations. 
Deployment: Kubernetes for scalable infrastructure. 
Analytics: ThinkingData for data collection, insights, and operational reporting. 
AI: Generative AI for game development support and LLMs for portal chatbot. 
+ Ensure code quality, scalability, and performance through code reviews, testing, and best practices.+ Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues, optimizing for low-latency and high-availability user experiences. 
 3. Project Management: 
Collaborate with the product team and stakeholders to define, prioritize, and maintain the project backlog.

We are looking for a Content Designer (Software & UX) to join our Vietnam-based software and marketing team. This role focuses on turning complex product features into clear, visually structured, and user-friendly content. 
You’ll be responsible for creating impactful user-facing documents and digital materials by applying strong layout sense, storytelling flow, and content clarity. Your ability to structure and present information visually will be the key to success in this role. 
We welcome candidates from Content design, UX writing, Editorial, or Publishing backgrounds who are passionate about helping users understand and engage with digital products. 
You’ll be part of the Vietnam Marketing team, working closely with the Technical Writing Manager in Canada. 
 Key Responsibilities
  Collaborate with the team to design and maintain user manuals, quick-start guides, FAQs, and in-product help content 
Break down technical workflows into clear, step-by-step content 
Organize and structure information with strong formatting and hierarchy 
Create onboarding and support materials such as tutorials, visuals, and product demo 
Work with developers, QA, and product managers to align content with feature releases 
Participate in product testing to ensure documentation usability 
Maintain an organized and up-to-date content library
Other ad-hoc duties as assigned
Communicate and report directly to leader in VN and Canada (chat, e-mail, and document)

Your skills and experience
Job Requirements
1. Visual Design & Layout Thinking (Top Priority) 
Strong sense of layout, spacing, formatting, and content hierarchy 
Familiar with MS Word, PowerPoint, Canva, and screenshot annotation tools 
Experience with Figma or Adobe InDesign is a plus — willingness to learn is equally valued 
2. Writing & Storytelling

Knows how to present and structure information logically for non-technical audiences 
Familiarity with tools like ChatGPT and Grammarly is helpful 
3. Digital Content Tools 
Experience with WordPress or similar platforms for updating content 
Familiarity with screen recording tools (e.g., Camtasia, Snagit, OBS) 
4. End-User Mindset 
Always considers what the user needs to know, and how they best absorb information 
Can follow instructions accurately and deliver content that is consistent and on-brand 
5. Collaboration & Professionalism 
Works well with cross-functional teams (dev, QA, product, marketing) 
Reliable, proactive, and responsive 
Experience in Agile/Scrum environments is a plus 
 🎓 Education & Background 
Degree in Communication, Content Design, Linguistics, Journalism, UX Writing, or related fields 
2+ years of experience in documentation, editorial content, UX content, or content production 
Experience working in a software or product-driven environment is preferred 
 Tools You’ll Use 
(All professional tools are licensed and provided by the company.) 
Canva, MS Word, PowerPoint 
Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, InDesign (training provided if needed) 
Camtasia, Snagit, OBS or other screen recording tools 
Grammarly, ChatGPT 
WordPress (training provided if needed)

Title: Mid/Senior QA Engineer
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
A very attractive salary package
20 annual leave days per year+public holidays
Hybrid flexible working mode
Skills and Experience:
Job description
We’re looking for people to join the Access family, who share our passion for believing in better, and who will help us continue to grow.
Love Work. Love Life. Be You. - is central to our success and how we give our customers the freedom to do more of what's important to them.
What does Access offer you?  
We offer a blended approach to office work, encouraging you to collaborate and connect in one of our thriving offices. We deliver on what we say, taking the development of our people seriously. We’ll work with you to progress your success plan and provide opportunities to accelerate your career.  
 On top of a competitive salary, our wellbeing days take you to 25 days leave a year and a health contribution, you’ll also be able to choose from a range of benefits to suit you. We’re an organisation that likes to give back, so you’ll also have three charity days allocated to support a cause that matters to you.  
 About you:  
We’re looking for a motivated, detail-oriented QA professional who thrives in a fast-paced, collaborative environment. You’ll support our Product Development Team by defining QA strategies and executing test plans. Working alongside QA specialists, you’ll use a variety of tools and follow industry best practices to ensure high-quality, client-focused product delivery.
 Day-to-day, you will:  
Collaborate with the Project Team to understand requirements, create test plans, and perform functional/non-functional testing.
Develop and maintain automation test cases for regression testing; identify and track bugs using Azure DevOps.
Support deployment processes, verify bug fixes, conduct post-release testing, and ensure releases meet quality standards.
Participate in Agile ceremonies, manage testing timelines, and contribute to improving QA processes and documentation.

Your skills and experience
Your skills and experiences might also include:  
Must Have: 
3+ years of software testing experience with strong skills in both manual and automated testing using frameworks like Playwright or Selenium.
Proficient in programming (e.g., Java, Python), Git, API testing (Postman), and test design techniques.
Familiar with CI/CD pipelines, Agile/Scrum methodologies, and experienced in creating test plans, strategies, and comprehensive test cases.
Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills in English, with a collaborative team mindset.
Nice to Have: 
Experience in performance testing (e.g., JMeter, K6) and security testing tools like Burp Suite.
Proven ability to work in cross-functional teams with developers, designers, and product owners.
Quick learner with adaptability to new technologies and tools; domain experience in recruitment systems is a plus.
QA certification (e.g., ISTQB) is an advantage.

Why you'll love working here
What does Access offer you?
A very attractive salary package
25 annual leave days per year + public holidays + 10 days sick leave
Hybrid flexible working mode
Social Insurance on Gross salary
Yearly health check-ups
Bao Viet Premium medical insurance
Annual company trip
Monthly events, Team outings, company parties, and other exciting events every quarter
Overtime rarely required. OT policies apply for every product release.
What are we all about?  
The Access Group is one of the largest UK-headquartered providers of business management software to small and mid-sized organisations in the UK, Ireland, USA and Asia Pacific. It helps more than 100,000 customers across commercial and non-profit sectors become more productive and efficient. Our products and solutions go beyond providing technology, we connect the right people with the right data, at the right time, through Access Workspace.
At Access, we are committed to creating a welcoming and inclusive environment where everyone can thrive. If you're excited about this role, (even if your previous experience doesn't align perfectly), you might just be the perfect fit for us! We wholeheartedly believe in equality for all and the transformative power of diversity.  Why not join our vibrant team where you can love what you do, love how you live, and most importantly, be authentically you? Let's make a difference together.  
Love Work. Love Life. Be You.

In this role, you will be at the forefront of adopting an AI-first approach to product development, continually challenging existing workflows and foundational engineering principles, while engaging in rapid experimentation to enhance value delivery to customers. Take end-to-end ownership of the product, designing systems to satisfy customers and validating assumptions with data driven insights.
Innovate like a startup—lead the charge from concept to deployment, continuously testing, learning, and improving your product with every iteration.
Embrace the full product lifecycle; prioritise it, understand it, design it, build it, test it, run it and own it.

Your skills and experience
Must-have skills
Backend experience: at least 7 years of backend engineering experience in one or more programming languages (Python, Java).
Team Leadership: at least 1 year of experience in leading teams or projects, including mentoring, code reviews, and owning delivery.
System Architecture Design: Strong experience in designing and implementing system architectures, including defining technical solutions and making high-level design decisions.
AI Tools: Proficient with Cursor or Windsurf; comfortable integrating AI tools into the development workflow.
Product-obsessed: You live and breathe product thinking—you’re not just here to generate code, but to own the product and drive its success. You focus on solving customer problems and delivering experiences that make a difference.
Customer focussed: You can talk to directly customers or subject matter experts and ask questions to deeply understand their needs so that you can deliver products that resonate.
Creative problem-solver: You tackle complex challenges with creativity and an analytical mindset, always balancing technical decisions with business outcomes.
Adaptability & hustle: You thrive in an ever-evolving environment, where you can wear many hats, pivot quickly, and move fast without losing focus on the big picture.
Team player with an edge: You bring a strong collaborative spirit to an AI-first team, but you’re also ready to lead initiatives and be the go-to person for the features you own.
Fluent in English: You’re a smooth communicator, capable of turning technical jargon into easy-to-understand ideas for both teammates and stakeholders.
Automation lover: You believe in the power of automated testing frameworks to build robust and reliable systems.
Love for Learning: You love learning new domains of knowledge and technologies so that you can build better products faster. You know there is always more to learn and are always open to being wrong.
Early Adopter: You have already built a few simple apps with AI tools, experimented with mcp servers and are familiar with prompt engineering.

Front-end development experience (eg, reactjs)

Why you'll love working here

Keen on presenting your ideas to your peers and management.

Title: Data Platform Engineer
Job Description:

Job description
With annual revenues of $400M, Vireo Health is transforming the healthcare landscape through our ambitious mission to focus on data to drive our business and to build a data infrastructure that helps us scale through acquisitions going from $400M to $1B+ in 2 years. We are building for a highly sophisticated business operation using data for LLMs, ML and analytics. We have a great Saigon AI and data platform team and we are looking to add two data engineers who can help us deliver a sophisticated well-governed data infrastructure from an early stage system and architecture. We are also using LLMs to drive key strategic and operational decisions and are looking for candidates committed to learning and growth with this area.
 Commitment to Talent: Excellent candidates are able to transfer to our US office after working with us for >1 year (if they want to)
 Responsibilities
Support our solutions architect and data platform leader (exac in building from scratch a data infrastructure that scales us as we acquire 4-5 companies a year, deploy AI/ML, and scale delivery and retail sales from $400M to $1.5B.
Data Warehouse & Lakehouse:
Design, implement, and optimize scalable data warehouse and lakehouse solutions (e.g., Delta Lake, Apache Iceberg, Snowflake, BigQuery).
Develop ETL/ELT pipelines to efficiently ingest, transform, and manage structured and unstructured data.
Ensure data governance, lineage, and security best practices, including access controls and encryption.
Optimize data storage, partitioning, and query performance for cost and efficiency.
 Data Platform, Cloud & System Reliability:
Build and maintain a robust, scalable data platform to support engineering, analytics, and AI workloads.
Deploy, manage, and optimize data infrastructure across cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure).
Improve system reliability, observability, and cost efficiency through monitoring, logging, and automation.
Develop SDKs, APIs, and auto-mation tools to enhance data engineering workflows.
Collaborate with Data Analytics, ML Engineers, and Software Engineers to enhance platform capabilities and scalability.
 AI Data Workload Implementation:
Integrate data with AI workloads, leveraging LLM techniques such as retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and fine-tuning.
Index and manage data within Vector Stores for optimized retrieval and real-time AI applications.
Develop external tools and APIs to enable LLMs and AI models to efficiently query and interact with data.

Your skills and experience
  4+ years of experience in data platform engineering, backend development, or data infrastructure. 
Ability to write complex SQL queries for data transformation, analysis, and optimization.
Strong programming skills in Python, Go, or Java for building scalable data solutions and microservices.
In-depth knowledge of distributed data processing frameworks (e.g., Spark, Flink) and hands-on experience with at least one cloud data platform (AWS Glue + Athena, Google BigQuery, Snowflake, or Databricks).
Proven experience in building reliable data pipelines and ETL workflows using workflow orchestration tools (e.g., DBT, Airflow, Dagster, Prefect).
Strong experience in data integration across various sources, including RDBMS, Vector Stores, and real-time data streaming technologies (Kafka, Pulsar, Kinesis).
Proficiency in containerization with Kubernetes, Docker for scalable Data & AI workloads.
Experience designing and optimizing Data Warehouse and Data Lakehouse Architectures: Delta Lake, Apache Iceberg.
Strong problem-solving skills, a product-led mindset, and AI-first thinking, with experience using AI for coding.
Excellent communication skills, in English, with the ability to collaborate across technical and non-technical teams.
Ability to quickly prototype, test, and iterate solutions and products.

Preferred Qualifications
  Familiarity with vector databases (Pinecone, FAISS, Weaviate, ChromaDB) for AI-driven applications is a plus
Understanding of data versioning, lineage, and governance (e.g., Apache Atlas, Great Expectations).

13th month and more 
Opportunity to transfer to the US
Work with LLMs

Title: Regular/Senior System Test Engineer (Automotive domain)
Job Description:
Top 3 reasons to join us
Great Challenges
Global Opportunities
Personal Growth
Skills and Experience:
Job description
Project Description:
 We are working on the development and validation of a Telematics Control Unit (TCU) for next generation connected vehicles. The TCU is a critical component responsible for enabling wireless communication between the vehicle and external networks, supporting functions such as over the air updates, emergency call (eCall), remote diagnostics, vehicle tracking, and infotainment services.

Our team consists of embedded software developers and system test engineers collaborating closely with global automotive OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers. As part of this team, the System Test Engineer will contribute to ensuring the quality, reliability, and compliance of the TCU with automotive standards. The role involves both manual and automated testing, including ASIL-related test cases to meet functional safety requirements.
 Responsibilities
The main responsibilities include:
Develop and execute system level test cases (manual and automated) for TCU.
Analyze system requirements and derive corresponding test cases.
Work with developers and project managers to identify and troubleshoot defects.
Maintain and enhance automation test scripts and test frameworks.
Ensure test traceability and coverage against system requirements.
Participate in test reviews, bug triaging, and release validation activities.

Your skills and experience
Skills
Must have:
Degree/Masters in Computer Science/Engineering/Electronic, or a related discipline, preferably with specialization or related experience in development for embedded systems
Strong knowledge of CAN protocol and related tools (Vector CANoe, CANalyzer...).
Experience with Python (for test automation scripting).
Understanding of UDS (Unified Diagnostic Services) for diagnostic testing.
Hands-on experience in system testing of embedded automotive systems.
Ability to design, execute, and document manual test cases.
Experience in test automation development and execution.
Familiarity with functional safety testing (ASIL Level).
Experience in embedded development tools (emulators, analyzers, oscilloscopes, etc)
Experience with software configuration management tools / version control tools
Customer-oriented and committed to work systematically under tight schedules
Able to learn and work independently and within a team expectation
Good written and oral communication skills
Nice to have:
Experience with CAPL scripting in CANoe environments.
Knowledge of ISO26262 and related safety test documentation.
Experience with Jenkins, Git, Jira or other CI/CD tracking tools.
Basic knowledge of C/C++ for embedded system debugging.
ISTQB certification or equivalent testing credentials.

Title: Chuyên Viên Phát Triển Ứng Dụng (Python, AWS, SQL)
Job Description:

Có cơ hội phát triển bản thân
Skills and Experience:
Job description
1. Thực hiện các công việc chuyên môn
a. Phát triển các ứng dụng liên quan hệ thống ngân hàng trực tuyến theo phân công của cấp trên, đảm bảo đúng tiến độ và chất lượng
b. Phối hợp thử nghiệm ứng dụng phụ trách nhằm đảm bảo ứng dụng trực tuyến hoạt động đáp ứng yêu cầu kỹ thuật, nghiệp vụ đã đề ra
c. Thực hiện nâng cấp phiên bản mới định kỳ theo khuyến cáo của nhà sản xuất cho các ứng dụng trực tuyến liên quan
d. Hỗ trợ chẩn đoán, xử lý sự cố và áp dụng các yêu cầu cải tiến cho các ứng dụng ngân hàng trực tuyến đã triển khai
e. Thực hiện các công việc khác theo phân công của cấp trên
2. Xây dựng/tham gia xây dựng, hỗ trợ triển khai chính sách, quy chế, quy định, quy trình liên quan
a) Tham gia xây dựng các chính sách, quy chế, quy định, quy trình liên quan tới hoạt động của đơn vị.
b) Tham gia đào tạo, phổ biến, hướng dẫn, giám sát việc triển khai chính sách, quy định, quy chế, quy trình.
3. Phát triển cá nhân
a) Tu dưỡng đạo đức, rèn luyện tác phong làm việc theo hướng chuyên nghiệp, hiện đại.
b) Tham gia các khóa đào tạo, tự đào tạo nhằm không ngừng nâng cao khả năng hiểu biết, trình độ chuyên môn nghiệp vụ và kiến thức, kỹ năng làm việc.
c) Xây dựng kế hoạch phát triển cá nhân phù hợp với xu hướng phát triển của hệ thống nhằm đáp ứng ngày càng tốt hơn yêu cầu của công việc và tổ chức.
4. Tuân thủ
a) Tuân thủ các quy định của pháp luật và quy định của HDBank trong quá trình thực hiện nghiệp vụ.Tuân thủ các quy tắc đạo đức nghề nghiệp của HDBank.
b) Tuân thủ sự điều động công tác và phân công công việc của Lãnh đạo có thẩm quyền.
5. Thực hiện nhiệm vụ khác do Lãnh đạo có thẩm quyền phân công

Your skills and experience
1. Kiến thức & kinh nghiệm làm việc:
Học vấn: Tốt nghiệp đại học các chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Khoa học máy tính hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan. (Ưu tiên ứng viên tốt nghiệp loại Khá, Giỏi).
Kỹ năng ngoại ngữ: Có khả năng đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật và giao tiếp cơ bản bằng Tiếng Anh.
Yêu cầu kinh nghiệm:
Lập trình Python: Ít nhất 1 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc với Python, đặc biệt là trong phát triển các ứng dụng Back-End.
Framework: Có kinh nghiệm sử dụng FastAPI, Flask, hoặc các framework tương tự để xây dựng và triển khai ứng dụng web thực tế.
Kiến trúc Microservices: Đã tham gia phát triển các dự án sử dụng mô hình kiến trúc Microservices.
Cơ sở dữ liệu:
Ít nhất 1 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc với cơ sở dữ liệu SQL.
Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm thực tế trên các nền tảng như PostgreSQL hoặc Oracle
Quản lý mã nguồn: Thành thạo với các công cụ quản lý mã nguồn như Git, GitLab hoặc GitHub
AWS và Containerization
Có kinh nghiệm làm việc thực tế với các dịch vụ AWS như API Gateway, Lambda, S3, Bedrock, và EC2.
Thành thạo với Docker, có kinh nghiệm xây dựng và triển khai containerized applications.
Hiểu biết cơ bản về việc sử dụng Docker trong môi trường AWS (ví dụ: ECS hoặc EKS).
2. Kỹ năng:
Kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề tốt, có khả năng xử lý tình huống phức tạp.
Kỹ năng đọc, phân tích và tổng hợp tài liệu một cách hiệu quả.
Kỹ năng làm việc nhóm, hỗ trợ đồng đội và đóng góp tích cực vào dự án.
Kỹ năng quản lý thời gian để hoàn thành công việc đúng tiến độ.
Kỹ năng trình bày ý tưởng mạch lạc, thuyết phục.
3. Tố chất & sở thích công việc:
Chính trực, đáng tin cậy trong công việc.
Tự tin, sáng tạo, sẵn sàng đề xuất giải pháp mới. - Chịu được áp lực công việc trong môi trường có yêu cầu cao. - Thích làm việc trong môi trường chuyên nghiệp, năng động tại HDBank.

Why you'll love working here
HDBank tạo cảm giác nơi làm việc như là một ngôi nhà thứ hai để bạn thỏa sức sáng tạo và đam mê.
Thưởng 13,14 
Thưởng theo xếp loại 
Bảo hiểm y tế, bảo hiểm tai nạn 
Du lịch nghỉ mát hằng năm 
Tăng lượng dịnh kì
